ast.source:
First day
The weekday for the very first day on the calendar.

第一天
日历上第一天的星期。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Month
The leap day will be added to this month.
ast.target:
月份
闰日将添加到此月份。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Your callback will receive the day and calendar parameters and must return a string or number
ast.target: 您的回调将接收 day 和 calendar 参数，并且必须返回一个 string 或 number

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: How strong the precipitation is, when it occurs

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Link the event to a note

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Use this to override what is displayed for a given day.
ast.target: 使用此选项覆盖特定日期的显示内容。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
The display format of your era can be whatever
                                you want, but you can also include the following
                                options:
ast.target: 纪元的显示格式可以自定义，但也可以包含以下选项：

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ abs_year }} - Displays the current year,
                                    but without a minus in front of it if is negative.
ast.target: {{ abs_year }} - 显示当前年份，但如果为负数则不显示负号。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ nth_year }} - Display the year with an
                                    ordinal (1st, 2nd, etc).
ast.target: {{ nth_year }} - 显示年份的序数形式（第1年、第2年等）。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ abs_nth_year }} - Combination of abs_year
                                    and nth_year.
ast.target: {{ abs_nth_year }} - abs_year 和 nth_year 的组合。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ era_year }} - The current era year. If
                                    any eras in the past has restarted the year count,
                                    this number will be different than the year number.
ast.target: {{ era_year }} - 当前纪元年份。如果过去的某个纪元重新开始计数，此数字将与年份数字不同。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ era_nth_year }} - Similar to nth_year,
                                    but counting only the era years.
ast.target: {{ era_nth_year }} - 类似于 nth_year，但仅计算纪元年份。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
{{ era_name }} - Inserts the current name
                                    of the era
ast.target: {{ era_name }} - 插入当前纪元的名称

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: This can always be toggled in the calendar menu.
ast.target: 此选项始终可以在日历菜单中切换。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Change how the start and end dates for seasons are calculated
ast.target: 更改季节开始和结束日期的计算方式

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Sets the temperature at which rain turns into snow. Default is 0 for Celsius, and 32 for Fahrenheit.
ast.target: 设置雨转雪的温度。默认值为摄氏0度，华氏32度。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Locations are different regions of your world that can have
                their own weather settings.
ast.target: 位置是世界中不同的区域，可以拥有各自的天气设置。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Choose a location to use by default.

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No calendars created! Create one in settings to get started.
ast.target: 尚未创建任何日历！请在设置中创建一个以开始使用。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Beginning full rescan for calendar events
ast.target: 开始全面重新扫描日历事件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Apply a common Calendarium as a preset.
ast.target: 将通用日历应用为预设。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the first three letters of the name will be used.
ast.target: 默认情况下，将使用名称的前三个字母。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If true, the leap day will not apply when the year meets the condition.

Requires the leap day to have at least one non-exclusive condition.
ast.target:
如果为真，当年份满足条件时，闰日将不适用。

要求闰日至少有一个非排他性条件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The condition will ignore the leap day's offset when checking to apply.
ast.target: 该条件在检查应用时将忽略闰日的偏移量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many days it takes for the moon to complete a full cycle.
ast.target: 月球完成一个完整周期所需的天数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shift the starting moon phase by a number of days.
ast.target: 将起始月相偏移若干天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Seasons will transition to the next season over this number of days.
ast.target: 季节将在这些天数内过渡到下一个季节。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Seasons will remain in effect for this number of days before beginning to transition.
ast.target: 季节将在开始过渡前持续这些天数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of days before the 'peak' weather of the season. Typically this occurs a few months into the season.
ast.target: 季节“峰值”天气前的天数。通常发生在季节开始后的几个月。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long a season's peak weather lasts.
ast.target: 季节峰值天气持续的时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Views will open to this calendar by default.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Calendarium can be restricted to look at certain paths in your vault for events. You can add specific paths here and associate default calendars to those paths. If no calendar is selected, Calendarium will add the event to your default calendar, if any.
ast.target: Calendarium 可以限制查看库中某些路径的事件。您可以在此添加特定路径，并将默认日历关联到这些路径。如果未选择日历，Calendarium 将把事件添加到您的默认日历（如果有）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All confirmations set to "Don't Ask Again" will be reset.
ast.target: 所有设置为“不再询问”的确认将被重置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control how the plugin reloads data when a sync is detected.
ast.target: 控制检测到同步时插件重新加载数据的方式。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Parse note titles for event dates
ast.target: 解析笔记标题中的事件日期

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 发生了不可想象的事情

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The moon must have a name.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The moon must have a positive cycle.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an issue opening that calendar.
ast.target: 打开该日历时出现问题。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display day of year in Day View
ast.target: 在日视图中显示年中的第几天

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Only notes with this tag will be scanned for inline events
ast.target: 仅带有此标签的笔记将被扫描以查找内联事件

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weeks will flow into the next month. Disable to reset the weekday each month.
ast.target: 周将延续到下个月。禁用此选项以每月重置星期几。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Intercalary months will appear a distinct months in the calendar.
ast.target: 闰月将在日历中显示为单独的月份。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Offset the year the leap day is applied to.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Intercalary days interrupt the normal flow of the month.
ast.target: 闰日会中断月份的正常流程。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If true, the leap day will not apply when the year meets the condition.\n\nRequires the leap day to have at least one non-exclusive condition.
ast.target: 如果为真，当年份满足条件时，闰日将不适用。\n\n要求闰日至少有一个非排他性条件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The condition will ignore the leap day's offset when checking to apply.
ast.target: 条件在检查是否应用时将忽略闰日的偏移量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display moons by default when viewing this calendar.
ast.target: 默认在查看此日历时显示月相。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A new year will begin the date this era starts.
ast.target: 新年将从该纪元开始的日期开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When seasonal colors are displayed, show a gradient between one color and the next.
ast.target: 当显示季节颜色时，在一种颜色和下一种颜色之间显示渐变。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Offset the first season from the start of the year. An offset of 0 means the seasons start on 1/1/0001.
ast.target: 将第一个季节从年初偏移。偏移量为0表示季节从1/1/0001开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Evenly distribute the year between your seasons, taking into account month length and leap days.
ast.target: 在季节之间均匀分配年份，考虑月份长度和闰日。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show seasonal colors on the calendar. Can be changed using the calendar settings menu.
ast.target: 在日历上显示季节颜色。可通过日历设置菜单更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A calendar for the real world.

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the summer solstice, the Sun travels the longest path through the sky, and that day therefore has the most daylight.
ast.target: 在夏至，太阳在天空中经过最长的路径，因此这一天白昼最长。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The winter solstice marks the shortest day and longest night of the year, when the sun is at its lowest arc in the sky.
ast.target: 冬至标志着一年中白昼最短、夜晚最长的一天，此时太阳在天空中的弧线最低。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The equinox marks the day and the night is equally as long.
ast.target: 春分/秋分标志着昼夜等长。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Christmas is a Christian holiday celebrating the birth of Christ. Due to a combination of marketability and long lasting traditions it is popular even among many non-Christians, especially in countries that have a strong Christian tradition.
ast.target: 圣诞节是基督教庆祝基督诞生的节日。由于市场化和悠久的传统，它在许多非基督徒中也很流行，尤其是在有强大基督教传统的国家。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first full moon after march 21st, which is considered the fixed date for the spring equinox.
ast.target: 3月21日（被视为春分固定日期）后的第一个满月。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Easter is considered the most important feast for Christians, celebrating the resurrection of Christ. It is classed as a moveable feast occurring on the first full moon after the spring equinox, which is considered to be fixed at March 21st for the sake of computing the date.
ast.target: 复活节被认为是基督教最重要的节日，庆祝基督的复活。它被归类为移动节日，发生在春分（为计算日期起见，固定为3月21日）后的第一个满月。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Monday following the Easter Sunday is often considered part of the Easter Celebration and is a day off in many countries with a strong Christian tradition.
ast.target: 复活节后的星期一通常被视为复活节庆祝活动的一部分，在许多有强大基督教传统的国家是休息日。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Good Friday is the Friday preceding Easter. It comemmorates the crucifixion of Christ according to the Bible.
ast.target: 耶稣受难日是复活节前的星期五。根据圣经，它纪念基督的受难。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Celebrated exactly 50 days after Easter, Pentecost is the celebration of the Holy Spirit appearing before the Apostles as described in the Bible.
ast.target: 五旬节在复活节后正好50天庆祝，是纪念圣经中描述的圣灵出现在使徒面前。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New Year's Day marks the date of a new year on the Gregorian Calendar. It dates when the clock strikes midnight and is often celebrated with fireworks, champagne and kissing.
ast.target: 元旦标志着公历新年的日期。当钟声敲响午夜时，通常以烟花、香槟和亲吻庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Valentine's day is a celebration of love and romance that is popular across the world. Many more cynically minded people mostly consider it an attempt to monetize the expectation of romantic gestures on the holiday through gift cards, flowers, chocolate and dates.
ast.target: 情人节是一个在世界各地流行的爱情和浪漫的庆祝活动。许多更愤世嫉俗的人主要认为它是通过礼品卡、鲜花、巧克力和约会来将浪漫姿态货币化的尝试。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Halloween is holiday popular in the US, Canada and Ireland that has gradually been adopted by more and more countries. It is often celebrated by people dressing up, usually as something scary. Children will often go from door to door shouting "trick or treat" in the hopes of receiving candy, while adults tend to go to parties.
ast.target: 万圣节是美国、加拿大和爱尔兰流行的节日，已逐渐被越来越多的国家采纳。人们通常打扮，通常是可怕的样子。孩子们经常挨家挨户喊“不给糖就捣蛋”，希望得到糖果，而成年人则倾向于参加派对。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day in 1582 the Gregorian calendar was officially introduced, following Thursday October 4th on the Julian Calendar
ast.target: 1582年的这一天，公历正式引入，紧随儒略历的10月4日星期四之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The 4th of Growfest is the first day of Low Summer in Oerth's Calendar. This is the point where the sun crosses Oerth's equator. Holidays celebrated on this date include Saint Cuthbert's Day, the Feast of Edoira, the Spring Feast, and Raxivort's Orgy. This is also the day on which the priests of Tlaloc ritually sacrifice and eat the flesh of human children or babies in their patron's honor. Worshippers of Rillifane Rallathil celebrate the Budding on this day, a joyful celebration of new life celebrated through dance and song in oak groves in the heart of the forest. A ritual hunt of a noble heart is held on this day, after which the venison is eaten in celebration of Rillifane's bounty.

Also celebrated on this date is the Sanctification of Renewal, a sacred holiday to the followers of Garyx.
ast.target: 生长节第4天是Oerth历法中低夏的第一天。这是太阳穿过Oerth赤道的时刻。此日期庆祝的节日包括圣卡斯伯特日、埃多拉盛宴、春宴和拉西沃特狂欢。这也是特拉洛克祭司们仪式性地牺牲并食用人类儿童或婴儿肉以纪念其守护神的日子。里利法恩·拉拉萨希尔的崇拜者在这一天庆祝萌芽节，这是一个在森林中心的橡树林中通过歌舞庆祝新生命的欢乐庆典。举行一次高贵之心的仪式狩猎，之后食用鹿肉以庆祝里利法恩的恩赐。\n\n同样在这一天庆祝的还有更新圣化节，这是加里克斯追随者的神圣节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the summer solstice, the Sun travels the longest path through the sky, and that day therefore has the most daylight.
ast.target: 在夏至，太阳在天空中经过最长的路径，因此这一天白昼最长。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The 4th of Brewfest is the Autumnal Equinox, when the sun crosses the equator from north to south. This date is the official end of high summer and the beginning of autumn on the Greyhawk Calendar. This date is holy to Wenta and is sometimes regarded as an unofficial holy day of Velnius. Among the xvarts, it also marks the celebration of Raxivort's Orgy. The worshippers of Rillifane Rallathil celebrate the Transformation on this day, a time of dancing and spiritual rebirth marking the beginning of autumn and the promise that spring will come again.
ast.target: 酿酒节第4天是秋分，此时太阳从北向南穿过赤道。这个日期是灰鹰历法中高夏的正式结束和秋天的开始。这个日期对温塔来说是神圣的，有时被视为维尔纽斯的非正式圣日。在斯瓦特人中，它也标志着拉西沃特狂欢的庆祝。里利法恩·拉拉萨希尔的崇拜者在这一天庆祝转变节，这是一个舞蹈和精神重生的时刻，标志着秋天的开始和春天将再次到来的承诺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The night of Great Moon's Glory on Readying 11th, when Luna is full but Celene is new. It is holy to Celestian, and a time when offerings are left to Atroa to beg her to come early and to Telchur to request that he peacefully leave. Druids of the Old Faith are known to also hold this night as auspicious, but few outside their circles know the details.
ast.target: 准备月11日的大月亮荣耀之夜，此时露娜满月而塞琳新月。这对塞莱斯蒂安来说是神圣的，也是向阿特罗亚留下祭品祈求她早来、向特尔丘尔请求他和平离开的时刻。已知旧信仰的德鲁伊也认为这个夜晚是吉祥的，但圈子外的人很少知道细节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Dark Night, also called Black Night, Star Night, and the Night of Hopeful Dawn, is observed on Goodmonth 11. It is a holy night for the church of Celestian because the stars are so easy to observe without the light of one of the moons getting in the way.

It is also a holy night for the church of Rao, who refer to it as the Night of Hopeful Judgment. They believe that Rao chooses this time to separate the sinful from the righteous in the afterworld. There is also a prophecy in the Raoan holy text, the Book of Incarum, that claims that Rao will cleanse the world of evil on this night, sometime in the future.

The priesthood of Kurell consider it holy, too, calling it Kurell's Night, requiring the faithful to undertake special missions on this night to prove their cleverness and skill. Kurell smiles particularly on acts of theft or vengeance performed on his holy night, blessing those who do so successfully. Donations to Kurell's church are encouraged afterwards, for Kurell may take vengeance against those who do not properly thank him for his aid.

Most other people regard Dark Night as a time of ill omen, fearing it as much as the night of the Blood Moon Festival. Bonfires are burned from dusk till dawn, particularly in small villages and in Elmshire and Narwell. Orc and goblin religions view it as an excellent night for raiding settlements. Certain evil cults perform kidnappings, murders, and vile rites during this period. On the other hand, lycanthropic activity is at its lowest.

Iggwilv and Tuerny attempted to summon a demonic army to Luna on this night in 585 CY.
ast.target:
黑暗之夜，也称为黑之夜、星之夜和希望黎明之夜，在善月11日庆祝。这是塞莱斯蒂安教会的神圣之夜，因为没有一个月亮的光线干扰，星星很容易观测。

这也是拉奥教会的神圣之夜，他们称之为希望审判之夜。他们相信拉奥选择这个时间在来世将罪人与义人分开。拉奥圣典《印卡鲁姆之书》中有一个预言，声称拉奥将在未来的某个夜晚净化世界的邪恶。

库雷尔的祭司也认为它是神圣的，称之为库雷尔之夜，要求信徒在这个夜晚执行特殊任务以证明他们的聪明和技巧。库雷尔特别青睐在他的圣夜成功进行的盗窃或复仇行为，并赐福于那些成功者。之后鼓励向库雷尔教会捐款，因为库雷尔可能会对那些没有适当感谢他帮助的人进行报复。

大多数其他人将黑暗之夜视为不祥之兆，像害怕血月节之夜一样害怕它。从黄昏到黎明燃烧篝火，特别是在小村庄和埃尔姆郡及纳威尔。兽人和地精宗教视其为袭击定居点的绝佳夜晚。某些邪恶教派在此期间进行绑架、谋杀和邪恶仪式。另一方面，狼人活动处于最低点。

伊格维尔夫和图尔尼在585 CY的这个夜晚试图召唤一支恶魔军队到露娜。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Agelong, observed on the 4th of Richfest (the Summer Solstice), is the celebration of the legendary creation of the elves. According to myth, after Corellon Larethian spilled his blood during the battle with Gruumsh, the rest of the Seldarine gathered this sacred blood and mingled it with the tears shed during the same battle by Sehanine Moonbow. The Seldarine then infused these divine fluids into vessels they had created to be the bodies of the elven race.

This day is, among the elves, mostly an excuse to go orc-hunting. Elven warriors cut themselves with daggers carved from volcanic glass to remind themselves of Corellon's own wound from Gruumsh's spear, then strive to slaughter as many orcs as possible during the night.
ast.target: 长岁节，在丰盛节第4天（夏至）庆祝，是精灵传奇创造的庆典。根据神话，在柯瑞隆·拉瑞斯安与格乌什战斗流血后，塞尔达林的其他成员收集了这神圣的血液，并与同一战斗中塞汉妮·月弓流下的眼泪混合。然后塞尔达林将这些神圣的液体注入他们为精灵种族创造的身体容器中。\n\n这一天，在精灵中，主要是去猎杀兽人的借口。精灵战士用火山玻璃雕刻的匕首割伤自己，以提醒自己柯瑞隆被格乌什长矛所伤的伤口，然后努力在夜间尽可能多地屠杀兽人。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Blood Moon Festival is celebrated on Coldeven 11, the night when Luna is full just before the Spring Equinox. On this night, curses are said to be twice as powerful and the forces of evil are at their strongest. Fiends roam the lands, and human sacrifice is common. This night is held especially sacred by cultists of Nerull, but worshipers of Kurell also mark this night as especially auspicious for acts of vengeance. Goodly folk superstitiously guard their homes with horseshoes, holy water, bottles of milk, and iron filings.

Demonic forces sent by Iuz destroyed the leadership of the Horned Society during the Blood Moon Festival of 583 CY.

It's possible that this is also the night the elves celebrate as Faerieluck.
ast.target:
血月节在冷月11日庆祝，这是春分前露娜满月的夜晚。据说在这个夜晚，诅咒的力量加倍，邪恶势力最为强大。恶魔横行，活人祭祀很常见。这个夜晚被奈鲁尔的崇拜者视为特别神圣，但库雷尔的崇拜者也认为这个夜晚对复仇行为特别有利。善良的人们迷信地用马蹄铁、圣水、牛奶瓶和铁屑守护家园。

伊乌兹派出的恶魔力量在583 CY的血月节期间摧毁了角社的领导层。

这可能是精灵庆祝仙运节的同一个夜晚。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Celebrated on on the Winter Solstice (Needfest 4), Breadgiving Day, is a day of charity observed in the Free City of Greyhawk by the faiths of Pelor, Rao, and Saint Cuthbert.

This was not originally a religious holiday as such. It is a new practice that began after the Greyhawk Wars to feed the refugees that flooded the city during that time. Since of Old City who line up by the hundreds along the Processional from the Black Gate. The booths are worked by low-ranking priests from all three religions, with armed priests of St. Cuthbert providing security. A smaller event is held simultaneously below Wharfgate in Greyhawk City's Shacktown.

The clergies of Heironeous, Pholtus, and Trithereon do not participate, but they compete with one another to perform good deeds the whole week of Needfest. The rivalries between Trithereon and Pholtus, Trithereon and Heironeous, and Pholtus and St. Cuthbert are such that the faiths sometimes fall into arguments and even blows if their "good deeds" conflict with each other. Greyhawk's rowdy citizens often cheer and place bets on the outcomes of these quarrels.

The priests of Pelor hold a morning ceremony on this day with a sermon, singing, and music.
ast.target:
在冬至（需求节第4天）庆祝的赠予面包日，是灰鹰自由城中佩洛尔、拉奥和圣卡斯伯特信仰遵守的慈善日。

这原本不是一个宗教节日。它是在灰鹰战争后开始的新的实践，旨在喂养当时涌入城市的难民。旧城的数百人在黑门旁的游行队伍中排队。摊位由来自所有三个宗教的低级祭司操作，圣卡斯伯特的武装祭司提供安全保障。同时在灰鹰城的码头门下的棚户区举行一个小型活动。

海若尼斯、福尔图斯和特里瑟隆的神职人员不参与，但他们在需求节整周互相竞争行善。特里瑟隆和福尔图斯、特里瑟隆和海若尼斯、福尔图斯和圣卡斯伯特之间的竞争如此激烈，以至于如果他们的“善行”相互冲突，信仰有时会陷入争论甚至打斗。灰鹰城喧闹的市民经常为这些争吵的结果欢呼和下注。

佩洛尔的祭司在这一天举行早晨仪式，包括布道、歌唱和音乐。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Also called Drunken Days or the Feast of Brewers, Brewfest, the fourth festival week of Oerth's calendar, is a rowdy period unsurprisingly claimed as a holy time by the churches of Olidammara and Wenta. The Free City of Greyhawk does not celebrate the entire week, but Brewfest 1 and Brewfest 7 are both set aside as public holidays. In Elmshire, the week is spent in restful, carefree music, drinking, and dancing. In Hardby it is spent with fistfights, riots, and ensuing hangovers. In Narwell it is celebrated with ale-brewing contests, horse races, beatings, and robbery. In Safeton it is celebrated with nervous violence and nightly orc hunts. The week is also sacred to the Old Faith.

The elves call this week Fallrite, and use it to contemplate the spirits of their ancestors, the passage to the afterworld, and the fragility of life. They believe other races make merry during Brewfest because they are "hiding" to avoid facing death's reality. In contrast, the olvenfolk strive to fulfill the most important of their duties and reach the most crucial of their decisions during this time of year. The elven kings and queens traditionally judge capital cases during Fallrite.
ast.target: 也称为醉酒日或酿酒师盛宴，酿酒节是Oerth历法的第四个节日周，是一个喧闹的时期，不出所料地被奥利达玛拉和温塔的教会视为神圣时间。灰鹰自由城不庆祝整周，但酿酒节第1天和第7天都被定为公共假日。在埃尔姆郡，这一周在宁静、无忧的音乐、饮酒和舞蹈中度过。在哈德比，则是在斗殴、骚乱和随后的宿醉中度过。在纳威尔，以啤酒酿造比赛、赛马、殴打和抢劫庆祝。在萨夫顿，以紧张的暴力和夜间猎杀兽人庆祝。这一周对旧信仰也是神圣的。\n\n精灵称这一周为秋礼，并用来沉思他们祖先的灵魂、来世的通道和生命的脆弱。他们相信其他种族在酿酒节期间狂欢是因为他们在“隐藏”以避免面对死亡的现实。相比之下，精灵族努力在这一年中的这个时候履行他们最重要的职责并做出最关键的决定。精灵国王和王后传统上在秋礼期间审理死刑案件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Faerieluck is a holiday celebrated by the elves in early spring, when the power of Faerie runs high and they celebrate with their fey cousins: the sprites, buckawns, pixies, nymphs and so forth. The point of the festival is to remind the elves of their ancient kinship with these creatures. The day is spent playing practical jokes, engaging in battles of wit, and general merriment.
ast.target: 仙运节是精灵在早春庆祝的节日，此时仙境的力量高涨，他们与他们的精类表亲——精灵、矮妖、皮克精、宁芙等一起庆祝。节日的目的是提醒精灵他们与这些生物的古老亲缘关系。这一天用于恶作剧、智力较量以及一般的欢乐。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Feast of Edoira is a holiday celebrated in the Domain of Greyhawk on Growfest 4, during the Spring Equinox. It is named after Edoira, a priest of Rao who centuries ago established the Edoiran Compact, a pact by which many of the lawful good-aligned faiths and people of the Domain could agree to cooperate. The Compact was later extended to non-lawful good and neutral faiths.

Edoira was never deified but was revered by many good faiths in the Domain. The holiday was marked by religious services on Godsday of Growfest led by the clerics of the good faiths who partook of the Compact, and secular festivals by the ordinary citizenry. Observance of the holiday has declined over the years, though the clergies of Rao and Pelor still hold their traditional interfaith services, with occasional participation by the priesthoods of Heironeous and Mayaheine. Since the end of the Greyhawk Wars most of the Domain's outlying communities no longer observe the holiday. Only one church in Safeton still does so.
ast.target: 埃多拉盛宴是在灰鹰领地生长节第4天（春分）庆祝的节日。它以埃多拉命名，埃多拉是拉奥的一位祭司，几个世纪前建立了埃多拉契约，通过该契约，领地的许多守序善良信仰和人民可以同意合作。后来该契约扩展到非守序善良和中立信仰。\n\n埃多拉从未被神化，但受到领地许多善良信仰的尊敬。这个节日的标志是生长节的神圣日由参与契约的善良信仰的神职人员领导的宗教仪式，以及普通公民的世俗节日。多年来，对这个节日的遵守有所下降，尽管拉奥和佩洛尔的神职人员仍然举行他们传统的跨信仰服务，偶尔海若尼斯和玛雅海因的祭司也会参与。自灰鹰战争结束以来，领地的大多数偏远社区不再庆祝这个节日。只有萨夫顿的一座教堂仍然这样做。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The highlight of Growfest is the Desportium of Magic. During this day torchlight only, no magic illumination is supposed to be used. Wizards and Sorcerers then perform feats of illusion and magic trying to outdo one another with their displays. Usually there is a panel of judges to decide, in the larger cities there is usually a limit of 5-person teams competing. Each performance during the Desportium of Magic uses a long established theme, that of an attack on the town by various monsters and Dark Elves, repelled by brave warriors and spellcasters. The displays, made up of any number of spells cast without the use of magic devices, cannot actually cause any harm to property or people, but must be as wonderful, striking, detailed, and lifelike as possible.

This motif is based on actual attacks through the years from the Uttermost War to the most recent Great Slave Raids. The idea is to make the attackers as dreadful as possible and the defenders as heroic as possible, secondary is to make sure that people will always remember the terror of the Uttermost War. In large cities like the CSIO and CSWE and Tarantis, these performances last all night and are amazing to watch. In smaller villages without spellcasters, puppet plays are often done in its stead.
ast.target: 生长节的高潮是魔法竞技场。在这一天，只允许使用火炬光，不应使用魔法照明。然后巫师和术士表演幻术和魔法，试图用他们的展示超越对方。通常有一个评审团来决定，在大城市通常限制5人团队参赛。魔法竞技场的每次表演都使用一个长期确立的主题，即城镇受到各种怪物和黑暗精灵的攻击，由勇敢的战士和施法者击退。这些展示由任意数量的法术组成，不使用魔法装置施放，不能对财产或人造成任何伤害，但必须尽可能精彩、引人注目、详细和逼真。\n\n这个主题基于从终极战争到最近的大奴隶袭击的实际攻击。目的是使攻击者尽可能可怕，防御者尽可能英勇，其次是确保人们永远记住终极战争的恐怖。在CSIO、CSWE和塔兰提斯这样的大城市，这些表演持续整夜，令人惊叹。在没有施法者的小村庄，通常用木偶戏代替。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Holy Day of Pelor, also known as Giving Day and Midsummer's Day, is celebrated on the Summer Solstice.

Because Pelor is widely loved by the commoners, this day is set aside as a day of rest in the Free City of Greyhawk. Only essential work is done on this day. Many merchants close their shops on Giving Day as well out of respect for the Sun Father and his teachings. Gambling houses are closed, but not hostelries, for Giving Day is a day of feasting and goodwill, a time for enjoying the fruits of the Oerth.

Public services are held from dawn until noon by Pelor's priests, outdoors if the weather permits (which if almost always does, as the clerics use weather-controlling magic for maximum sunlight). Even Greyhawk City's large temple of Pelor is not big enough to hold the throngs who come to celebrate on this day, so throngs of the faithful fill the temple grounds in the Garden Quarter, spilling out from the Millstream to the Nobles' Wall, and to the road leading toward Greyhawk's Grand Theater. Many come, of course, for the free meal the priests provide after the service. The Pelorian priests are well aware of this, but believe that for the needy, a full stomach must come before wisdom and learning. Members of Greyhawk's Guild of Thieves and Beggar's Union, many of whom remember Midsummer's Day fondly from their orphaned childhoods, both protect priests of Pelor on this day, and woe onto those who attempt to test them on this matter.

Priests of Pelor, bedecked in yellow and gold, parade about the streets, demanding donations for their charitable works, freely using guilt to squeeze more from stingy purses. Free healings are given out, particularly to children. Most Greyhawkers wear at least one item of yellow cloth on this day out of respect.

Some crusading Pelorians crusade against evil lycanthropes on this night, since both Celene and Luna are full.
ast.target:
佩洛尔圣日，也称为赠予日和仲夏日，在夏至庆祝。

由于佩洛尔深受平民爱戴，这一天在灰鹰自由城被定为休息日。只有必要的工作在这一天进行。许多商人也在赠予日关闭店铺，以示对太阳之父及其教义的尊重。赌场关闭，但旅馆不关，因为赠予日是盛宴和善意的日子，是享受Oerth果实的时刻。

从黎明到中午，佩洛尔的祭司举行公共仪式，如果天气允许（几乎总是如此，因为神职人员使用天气控制魔法以获得最大阳光），则在户外进行。即使是灰鹰城的大型佩洛尔神庙也不足以容纳前来庆祝的人群，因此成群的信徒挤满了花园区的神庙场地，从磨坊溪溢出到贵族墙，以及通往灰鹰大剧院的道路。许多人当然是为了祭司在仪式后提供的免费餐食而来。佩洛尔祭司深知这一点，但相信对于有需要的人来说，饱腹必须先于智慧和学识。灰鹰盗贼公会和乞丐工会的成员，其中许多人从孤儿童年起就深情地记得仲夏日，都在这一天保护佩洛尔的祭司，任何试图在这一问题上考验他们的人都会遭殃。

佩洛尔的祭司，身着黄色和金色，在街上游行，为他们的慈善工作募捐，自由地利用内疚感从吝啬的钱包中榨取更多。提供免费治疗，特别是对儿童。大多数灰鹰居民在这一天至少穿一件黄色布料以示尊重。

一些十字军佩洛尔信徒在这个夜晚讨伐邪恶的狼人，因为塞琳和露娜都是满月。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Holy Day of Serenity, on Reaping 10, is celebrated in Veluna as a holy day of Rao, though it's actually the anniversary of Veluna's secession from Furyondy in 476 CY. It is celebrated with religious singing and worship.
ast.target: 宁静圣日，在收割月10日，在维鲁纳作为拉奥的圣日庆祝，尽管它实际上是维鲁纳在476 CY从弗瑞昂迪分离的周年纪念日。它以宗教歌唱和崇拜庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar for the world of Pathfinder.

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Zon-Kuthon

Culminating on the first new moon of the new year, the Eternal Kiss is an 11 day ceremony honoring Zon-Kuthon. On the final day, a living sacrifice is made to the Dark Prince, after the victim is pampered and pleasured for the ten days prior. The sacrifice can either be an enemy or a great devotee of the church, and is kept alive for as long as possible during the torture using magic. This holiday often involves fortune-telling as a part of the torture, using the victim's entrails or their cries of pain to determine the Midnight Lord's will. Occasionally it is believed that the sacrifice will prophesy with the voice of Zon-Kuthon himself.
ast.target: 宗-库松\n\n永恒之吻是一个为期11天的仪式，在新年的第一个新月达到高潮，以纪念宗-库松。在最后一天，在受害者被宠爱和取悦十天后，向黑暗王子献上活祭。牺牲可以是敌人或教会的大信徒，并在酷刑期间尽可能长时间地使用魔法保持存活。这个节日通常涉及算命作为酷刑的一部分，使用受害者的内脏或痛苦的哭声来确定午夜领主的意志。有时相信牺牲会以宗-库松本人的声音预言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Longnight is a holiday celebrated on the full moon in the winter month of Abadius. During the festival, revelers stay up all night to greet the dawn to defy the long winter months. It is even celebrated in Irrisen, where there are no natural seasons.
ast.target: 长夜节是在冬季月份阿巴迪乌斯的满月庆祝的节日。在节日期间，狂欢者整夜不睡迎接黎明，以挑战漫长的冬季月份。甚至在伊里森也有庆祝，那里没有自然季节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Absalom, Milani

Foundation Day is a civil holiday celebrated on the New Year (1 Abadius) in Absalom to commemorate the city's founding by the god Aroden in 1 AR.
ast.target: 阿布萨隆，米兰妮\n\n建国日是在新年（1阿巴迪乌斯）在阿布萨隆庆祝的民间节日，以纪念城市由神阿罗登在1 AR建立。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Irrisen

Pjallarane Day is an ancient holiday in Irrisen celebrated on 1 Abadius (New Year's Day). Every 100 years, Baba Yaga returns to Golarion to remove her daughter from the throne of Irrisen, and put another daughter on the throne instead. In 3713 AR the third Queen of Irrisen, Pjallarane, and her children chose to resist. Baba Yaga ruthlessly crushed the rebellion in a single day, which is now celebrated as a holiday. The festival includes feasting and the burning of effigies of tar and straw. This is a reminder of the fate of Pjallarane's followers, who were burned alive as a warning to all those who would oppose Baba Yaga.
ast.target: 伊里森\n\n皮亚拉兰日是在伊里森于1阿巴迪乌斯（元旦）庆祝的古老节日。每100年，巴巴亚加返回格拉利昂，将她的女儿从伊里森王座上移除，并将另一个女儿放在王座上。在3713 AR，伊里森的第三位女王皮亚拉兰和她的孩子们选择抵抗。巴巴亚加在一天内无情地镇压了叛乱，现在这一天被作为节日庆祝。节日包括盛宴和焚烧焦油和稻草制成的肖像。这是对皮亚拉兰追随者命运的提醒，他们被活活烧死，作为对所有反对巴巴亚加的人的警告。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Abadar

Vault Day is a holiday held on 6 Abadius in honor of Abadar, Master of the First Vault.
ast.target: 阿巴达尔\n\n宝库日是在6阿巴迪乌斯举行的节日，以纪念第一宝库之主阿巴达尔。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Osirion

The Ruby Prince's Birthday is a national holiday in Osirion in honor of the birthday of Khemet III, the Ruby Prince. It is celebrated annually on the 20 Abadius.
ast.target:
奥斯里昂

红宝石王子的生日是奥斯里昂的一个全国性节日，为纪念红宝石王子凯美特三世的诞辰。每年于阿巴迪乌斯月20日庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Druma, Cayden Cailean

A holiday occurring on 2 Calistril, Merrymead was dateed in Druma and is supposed to be a time to share of the last of the previous year's mead with the rest of the community.

In current times, most people just use it as an excuse to drink excessively. The poor travel from bar to bar drinking whatever alcohol they can afford, while the wealthy will set aside specific vintages for this day. A known consequence of this day are 'mead riots' that happen when there are more celebrants than there is alcohol to serve them. This leads to a violent, destructive group of people in a crowded bar. If this is a common occurrence for particular cities, they may reinforce their guard force for the inevitably eventful night.
ast.target:
杜鲁玛，凯登·凯连

梅里米德节是杜鲁玛的一个节日，于卡利斯特里尔月2日庆祝，本意是与社区分享去年剩余蜂蜜酒的时刻。如今，大多数人只是将其作为纵酒狂欢的借口。穷人从一家酒吧喝到另一家，尽其所能购买酒水，而富人则会为这一天珍藏特定年份的佳酿。这一天的一个已知后果是“蜂蜜酒暴动”，当庆祝者人数超过可供应的酒水时便会发生。这会导致拥挤的酒吧中出现暴力、破坏性的人群。如果某些城市频繁发生此类事件，它们可能会加强警卫力量，以应对这个不可避免的动荡之夜。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

King Eodred II's Birthday was a local holiday in the Varisian city-state of Korvosa and was celebrated on 16 Calistril. It commemorated the birthday of its former ruler, King Eodred Arabasti II, who decreed that on the day, scantily clad women would dance and serve free wine to celebrants.
ast.target:
科沃萨

国王埃奥德雷德二世的诞辰是瓦瑞西亚城邦科沃萨的一个地方性节日，于卡利斯特里尔月16日庆祝。它纪念其前统治者埃奥德雷德·阿拉巴斯提二世国王的诞辰，他下令在这一天，衣着暴露的女子将跳舞并为庆祝者提供免费葡萄酒。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Cheliax, Asmodeus

Loyalty Day is a holiday in the nation of Cheliax commemorating the date on Calistril 19, 4640 AR when House Thrune signed the Treaty of Egorian, declaring it the victor in the Chelish Civil War and ruler of the empire. Because of House Thrune's well-known ties to the infernal, this holiday is also observed by the Church of Asmodeus who consider it a feast day. The church along with local governments provide a free meal to all citizens to remind them of the benefits House Thrune provides them with.
ast.target:
切利亚斯，阿斯摩蒂斯

忠诚日是切利亚斯国的一个节日，纪念4640年卡利斯特里尔月19日，瑟鲁恩家族签署《埃格里安条约》，宣布其在切利亚斯内战中的胜利并成为帝国统治者。由于瑟鲁恩家族与地狱的众所周知的关系，这一节日也被阿斯摩蒂斯教会视为圣日。教会与地方政府共同为所有公民提供免费餐食，以提醒他们瑟鲁恩家族带来的福祉。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Mahathallah

Followers of Mahathallah mark each leap day as Fateless Day, when the River of Souls temporarily stops and souls can escape Pharasma's judgment. They perform many sacrificial and suicidal rituals on Fateless Day.
ast.target:
玛哈萨拉

玛哈萨拉的追随者将每个闰日标记为“无命日”，此时灵魂之河暂时停滞，灵魂可以逃脱法莱斯玛的审判。他们在无命日进行许多献祭和自杀仪式。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Magnimar, Varisia

The Golemwalk Parade is a parade of golems created by amateurs hoping to win a monetary grant, or even a job, from the Golemworks in Magnimar. At the end of the parade along the Avenue of Honors, the constructs are judged.
ast.target:
马格尼马尔，瓦瑞西亚

魔像游行是由业余爱好者创造的魔像组成的游行，他们希望赢得马格尼马尔魔像工坊的资助金甚至工作机会。在沿着荣誉大道的游行结束时，这些构造体将接受评判。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Pharasma

Priests and worshipers of the Lady of Graves parade the bodies of the recently dead on this holiday, holding free burials afterwards.
ast.target:
法莱斯玛

在这个节日中，墓穴女士的祭司和信徒们抬着近期逝者的尸体游行，随后举行免费葬礼。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Sable Company Founding Day is a holiday marking the founding of the Sable Company of the Varisian city-state of Korvosa. Celebrated on 6 Pharast, the day is marked by somber military parades that generally preclude the consumption of alcohol, a staple on most other holidays.
ast.target:
科沃萨

黑貂连队成立日是纪念瓦瑞西亚城邦科沃萨黑貂连队成立的节日。于法拉斯图月6日庆祝，这一天以肃穆的军事游行著称，通常不涉及饮酒，而饮酒是大多数其他节日的常见内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Solku

The Night of Tears held annually on 7 Pharast in the Katapeshi town of Solku. It is a solemn vigil commemorating those lost in the Battle of Red Hail in 4701 AR.
ast.target:
索尔库

“泪之夜”每年于法拉斯图月7日在卡塔佩什小镇索尔库举行。这是一个庄严的守夜活动，纪念4701年“红色冰雹之战”中的逝者。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Qadira

Kaliashahrim is a national holiday celebrated on Pharast 13 in Qadira that celebrates the Padishah Emperor of distant Katheer, and Qadira's loyalty to him.
ast.target:
卡迪拉

卡利亚沙里姆是卡迪拉的一个全国性节日，于法拉斯图月13日庆祝，以纪念遥远的卡西尔的帕迪沙皇帝，以及卡迪拉对他的忠诚。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Nex

Every year, on the 26th of Pharast, Elder Architect Oblosk \u2014 oldest member of Nex's Council of Three and Nine \u2014 ascends to the highest balconies of the Bandeshar in Quantium. In a voice made thunderous by the platform's magic, the wizened pech councilman spends the hours from dusk to just past noon enumerating the atrocities committed by the necromancers of Geb upon the people of Nex, culminating with the disappearance of the archwizard Nex himself. At the conclusion of this record of national wounds, the country's eleven other council members join Oblosk in renewing their yearly vow to neither forget nor forgive the Gebbites' atrocities and to again swear in their lost ruler's name to endlessly wage war against their ancient enemies.

On this day, known as Conquest Day, all the people of Nex are expected to share in their leaders' oaths, to celebrate the shared patriotism of their wondrous nation, and to remember the sacrifices of heroes past. This also makes it a day for many Nexian wizards to reveal deadly new spells, gigantic constructs, and audacious arcane masterworks\u2014which many creators promise to be the doom of their foes. Even throughout the rest of the Inner Sea region, many crusaders, rebels, and zealots observe Conquest Day as a day to renew blood oaths, launch long-planned battles, and finally take revenge. It is a day for words of honor, a day for battle cries, and a day where glory most favors the bold.
ast.target:
奈克斯

每年法拉斯图月26日，奈克斯三九议会中最年长的成员——大建筑师奥布罗斯克——登上坎提姆班德沙尔最高的阳台。借助平台的魔法，他的声音如雷鸣般洪亮，这位年迈的皮奇议员从黄昏到次日正午，历数格布的死灵法师对奈克斯人民犯下的暴行，最终以奥术大师奈克斯本人的失踪告终。在这份民族创伤的记录结束时，该国的其他十一位议会成员与奥布罗斯克一起，重申他们每年一度的誓言：既不忘记也不原谅格布人的暴行，并以他们失落统治者的名义再次发誓，无休止地向他们的宿敌开战。这一天被称为“征服日”，所有奈克斯人民都应分享他们领袖的誓言，庆祝他们奇妙国家的共同爱国主义，并铭记过去英雄的牺牲。这也使得这一天成为许多奈克斯法师揭示致命新法术、巨型构造体和大胆奥术杰作的日子——许多创造者承诺这些将成为他们敌人的末日。即使在内海地区的其他地方，许多十字军、反叛者和狂热分子也将征服日视为重申血誓、发动筹划已久的战斗和最终复仇的日子。这是一个荣誉之言的日子，一个战斗呐喊的日子，一个荣耀最青睐勇者的日子。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Asmodeus, Cheliax

The Days of Wrath, or Dies Irae, are a holiday celebrated on both solstices and equinoxes in the nation of Cheliax and wherever Asmodeus is worshiped. They are primarily a national holiday and not truly a religious one, but the two are often confused due to Cheliax's current political climate. Various contests and blood sports are held on these days, promoting those elites who can clearly demonstrate their superiority over others. Some believe that these competitions are watched and judged by devils themselves. In the parts of the world where the Prince of Darkness is not openly venerated, these holidays take on a different tone: they are used to settle old grievances and also to end contracts.

In these days, bloodsports are organized into cities' stadiums. Slaves and servants of any master may choose to enter the arena for one-on-one bloody battles to the death. Free men and women of all classes are free to enter the arena as well. The entrants fight in rounds until at last one stands alone. The winner is granted freedom from slavery or servitude, erasure of all debts, and a purse of gold.

The winter solstice sees the culmination of the Dies Irae, with all the winners of the three previous bouts summoned to Egorian to fight to the death for the amusement of the nobles. The winner is given a title of baronet and a plot of land.
ast.target:
阿斯摩蒂斯，切利亚斯

“愤怒之日”或“Dies Irae”是在切利亚斯国以及任何崇拜阿斯摩蒂斯的地方庆祝的节日，分别在夏至、冬至和春分、秋分举行。这主要是一个国家节日，而非真正的宗教节日，但由于切利亚斯当前的政治气候，两者常常混淆。在这些日子里，举行各种竞赛和血腥运动，提升那些能够清楚展示自己优于他人的精英。有些人认为这些比赛受到魔鬼本身的监视和评判。在公开不崇拜黑暗王子的世界其他地方，这些节日呈现出不同的基调：它们被用来解决旧怨和终止合同。在这些日子里，城市体育场组织血腥运动。任何主人的奴隶和仆人都可以选择进入竞技场进行一对一的血腥生死战。所有阶层的自由男女也可以自由进入竞技场。参赛者进行多轮战斗，直到最后一人站立。获胜者将获得自由、债务免除和一袋金币。冬至是愤怒之日的 culmination，前三场比赛的所有获胜者被召唤到埃格里安，为贵族们的娱乐进行生死搏斗。获胜者将获得男爵头衔和一块土地。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Gozreh

Firstbloom is a holiday celebrating the first planting of the agricultural season, and generally associated with the weather god Gozreh. It falls on the vernal equinox. Many farming communities see it as the beginning of the year, even though conventional calendars begin two months earlier. Despite weariness after a full day planting, many farming communities hold celebrations come the night: feasting, dancing and courtship feature showing the cycle of nature.
ast.target:
戈兹雷

“初绽节”是庆祝农业季节首次播种的节日，通常与天气之神戈兹雷相关。它在春分时节举行。许多农业社区将其视为一年的开始，尽管传统日历提前两个月开始。尽管经过一整天的种植后疲惫不堪，许多农业社区在夜晚举行庆祝活动：盛宴、舞蹈和求爱，展示自然的循环。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Falcon's Hollow

The First Cut celebration in Falcon's Hollow used to mark the date of the work in the woods each spring. Now, however, it is a meaningless ramshackle ceremony as Thuldrin Kreed forces the lumber crews to work through even during the coldest months in the winter. Still, First Cut brings people out to celebrate the date of the spring.
ast.target:
猎鹰之谷

猎鹰之谷的“初伐节”过去标志着每年春季森林工作的开始。然而现在，由于图尔德林·克里德迫使伐木队在冬季最寒冷的月份也继续工作，这已成为一个毫无意义的草率仪式。尽管如此，初伐节仍让人们走出家门，庆祝春天的到来。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Gozreh

On this religious holiday, all who travel on the water make offerings to Gozreh in the hopes of safe passage for the coming year.
ast.target:
戈兹雷

在这个宗教节日里，所有在水上旅行的人都向戈兹雷献祭，以求来年旅途平安。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Abadar

No one enjoys paying taxes but the collection of fair taxes is considered an integral part of the maintenance of society, and is therefore holy to the god Abadar. Every year on the 15th of Gozran, priests of the church of Abadar spend the day walking city streets, doing what they can to make the bitter pill of annual taxes a bit easier to swallow.

The Business of the Day

From dawn to dusk, clerics of Abadar attend the tax collectors of sizeable communities as the tax wagons roll from door to door. The church officials monitor these activities to make sure that the process is conducted respectfully and justly, and that citizens know that the process is monitored. More than just aiding in the yearly errand, the faithful personally thank every citizen for contributing to the improvement of their city, extol the public works funded by their contributions, and foretell the grandeur of civic projects to come. The disenfranchised and destitute they attempt to comfort as best they can, quoting from their god's dogma on work and worthiness, but this is not a day for discounts or deferrals. The citizens are able to voice their concerns and ideas as to where the monies levied should best be applied. Citizens are free to speak their mind on any issue here without fear of repercussion.

The Celebrations of the Day

At dusk, the Abadarans host several celebrations in parks, plazas, and other communal areas about the city, organizing donations and contributions from local vendors to feed and entertain all-comers. Having already preached to most of the city over the course of the day, the clerics perform only a brief opening ceremony, dedicating the feast to Abadar, the city, and its great people. These celebrations are often quite distinct from neighbourhood to neighbourhood and are almost always divided along economic boundaries.

The festivities involving the wealthiest citizens usually happen on the steps of city hall or other grand civic buildings and feature the best music and food, but often little more than polite card and guessing games. These galas usually wrap up by midnight.

For the common folk, the parks and marketplaces take on a carnival atmosphere, with simple but good food, local ales, performances by talented citizens, and games of chance going on well into the night. A prevailing superstition through these festivals is that, during the celebration, it is lucky to kiss\u2014or in some regions, pinch\u2014a cleric of Abadar, leading to many a rosy-cheeked cleric.

Even the city's poor are given reason to celebrate, as the local temple of Abadar hosts a cheery but unabashedly religious gathering on its steps, feeding all comers, doling out a hearty ration of wine, singing hymns of the faith, and providing tokens for a second wine ration for any who return to attend a service within the month.

For a holiday that revolves around paying taxes, this Abadaran festival is not as reviled as one might expect.
ast.target:
阿巴达尔

没有人喜欢纳税，但公平征税被视为维护社会不可或缺的一部分，因此对阿巴达尔神来说是神圣的。每年戈兹兰月15日，阿巴达尔教会的祭司们会花一天时间走在城市街道上，尽其所能让年度税收的苦药更容易下咽。

当日事务

从黎明到黄昏，阿巴达尔的牧师们会陪同较大社区的税务官，当税车挨家挨户收取时。教会官员监督这些活动，确保过程得到尊重和公正，并让公民知道过程受到监督。除了协助年度差事外，信徒们还亲自感谢每位公民为城市改善所做的贡献，赞扬由他们的贡献资助的公共工程，并预言即将到来的宏伟市政项目。他们尽力安慰弱势和贫困者，引用他们神祇关于工作和价值的教义，但这不是折扣或延期的一天。公民可以就税款的最佳用途表达他们的关切和想法。公民可以在这里自由发表意见，无需担心报复。

当日庆祝

黄昏时分，阿巴达尔信徒在城市公园、广场和其他公共区域举办多场庆祝活动，组织当地供应商的捐赠和贡献，以提供食物和娱乐所有来客。由于已经在一天中向大部分城市布道，牧师们只举行简短的开幕式，将盛宴献给阿巴达尔、城市及其伟大的人民。这些庆祝活动在不同街区之间往往截然不同，并且几乎总是按经济界限划分。涉及最富裕公民的庆祝活动通常发生在市政厅或其他宏伟市政建筑的台阶上，提供最好的音乐和食物，但通常只有礼貌的纸牌和猜谜游戏。这些盛会通常在午夜结束。对于普通民众来说，公园和市场呈现出嘉年华氛围，提供简单但美味的食物、本地麦芽酒、有才华的公民的表演以及持续到深夜的博彩游戏。在这些节日中，一种普遍的迷信是，在庆祝期间，亲吻——或在某些地区，捏——阿巴达尔的牧师会带来好运，导致许多牧师脸颊通红。即使是城市的穷人也得到了庆祝的理由，因为当地的阿巴达尔神庙在其台阶上举办了一场愉快但毫不掩饰的宗教集会，为所有来客提供食物，分发丰盛的葡萄酒配给，并发放代币，任何在一个月内返回参加礼拜的人可以获得第二份葡萄酒配给。对于一个围绕纳税的节日来说，这个阿巴达尔节日并不像人们预期的那样令人厌恶。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran, Brigh

This local festival in the Andoran port city of Augustana is held to honor and celebrate the local shipbuilding industry as well as the navy. The mathematics and engineering required for the building of the ships is praised by Brigh's faithful.
ast.target:
安多安，布莱

这个在安多安港口城市奥古斯塔纳举办的地方性节日，旨在庆祝和表彰当地的造船业以及海军。布莱的信徒赞美造船所需的数学和工程学。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Absalom

One of two local festivals where kite-battlers compete.
ast.target:
艾巴萨罗姆

两个地方性风筝对战节之一。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Iomedae, Lastwall, Ustalav

A national holiday to commemorate those who died in the Shining Crusade against the Whispering Tyrant. Although not strictly a religious holiday, Iomedae's name is heavily invoked, due to her many military accomplishments during the war.
ast.target:
艾奥梅黛，终焉之墙，乌斯塔拉夫

一个全国性节日，纪念在对抗低语者的光辉十字军中阵亡者。虽然严格来说并非宗教节日，但由于艾奥梅黛在战争中的许多军事成就，她的名字被频繁引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Magnimar, Varisia

Angel Day is a local Magnimarian holiday celebrated on 31 Desnus. The annual celebration marks the founding of the city, and its founders' flight from Korvosa. It also honors the presence and popular worship of the empyreal lords, which predates the city by centuries. During the festival, nearly all local businesses shut their doors and the citizens take part in countless feasts, masquerade balls dressed as angels, and the burning of devil effigies meant to symbolize infernally-influenced Korvosa.
ast.target:
马格尼马尔，瓦瑞西亚

天使日是马格尼马尔的一个地方性节日，于德斯努斯月31日庆祝。这一年度庆典标志着城市的建立，以及其建立者从科沃萨的逃离。它也纪念了早于城市数个世纪的至尊天神的出现和普遍崇拜。在节日期间，几乎所有当地企业都关门歇业，市民们参加无数盛宴、装扮成天使的化装舞会，以及焚烧象征受地狱影响的科沃萨的魔鬼像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Holiday celebrating Old-Mage Jatembe, the father of Garundi magic.
ast.target: 纪念老法师贾特比——加仑迪魔法的父亲——的节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Festival of the Ruling Sun

Shizuru

Celebrates the longest day.

Founder's FollyUlar Kel

Adventurers and children follow a hallucinatory red stripe along zigzagging paths, amusing residents.

Harvest Bounty Festival

Segada

Marking the beginning of the harvest season, this festival involves sporting tournaments, dancing, storytelling, and feasts. Celebrants give thanks and eliminate grudges.

Longwalk

Grandmother Spider, Nurvatchta; southern hemisphere winter solstice

Celebrates the escape of Nurvatchta's anadi people from bondage, in part thanks to Grandmother Spider lengthening their cover of darkness in their escape.

Ritual of Stardust

Desna

Festival held in the evening and through the night, where Desna's faithful sing songs and throw sand and powdered gems into bonfires.

Runefeast

Magrim

Day marking the day dwarves learnt the first runes and the proper way to pray.

Sunwrought FestivalSarenrae, Brigh

Day commemorating the defeat of Rovagug by Sarenrae, celebrated with the flying of kites, fireworks, and gift giving.
ast.target:
统治太阳节

希祖尔

庆祝最长的一天。

创立者愚行

乌拉·凯尔

冒险者和儿童沿着幻觉般的红色条纹沿着曲折的小路行进，娱乐居民。

丰收节

塞加达

标志着收获季节的开始，这个节日包括体育锦标赛、舞蹈、讲故事和盛宴。庆祝者表达感谢并消除积怨。

长途行走

蜘蛛祖母，努尔瓦查塔；南半球冬至

庆祝努尔瓦查塔的阿纳迪人民摆脱奴役的逃亡，部分归功于蜘蛛祖母延长了他们逃亡时的黑暗掩护。

星尘仪式

黛丝娜

在傍晚和夜间举行的节日，黛丝娜的信徒唱歌并将沙子和宝石粉末扔进篝火中。

符文盛宴

马格里姆

纪念矮人学习第一个符文和正确祈祷方式的日子。

太阳锻造节

莎伦莱，布莱

纪念莎伦莱击败罗瓦古格的日子，以放风筝、烟花和赠送礼物庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Sarenrae

The holy, month-long festival ends on this day, featuring dances with flaming blades.
ast.target:
莎伦莱

为期一个月的圣洁节日在这一天结束，以火焰刀舞为特色。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran, Milani

Holiday celebrating Andoran's independence. Milanites celebrate that very little violence occurred.
ast.target:
安多安，米兰妮

庆祝安多安独立的节日。米兰妮信徒庆祝几乎没有发生暴力事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran

The Eagle Knights perform aerial displays in Almas on this day.
ast.target:
安多安

鹰骑士在这一天在阿尔马斯进行空中表演。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

An early summer holiday that honors a cooling shift in the winds, celebrated with much drinking.
ast.target:
科沃萨

一个初夏节日，纪念风向转凉的变化，以大量饮酒庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Iomedae

Inheritor's Ascendance, originally called 'Herald's Day', honours the day that Iomedae was chosen by the god Aroden to become his herald (thus replacing Arazni), thus boosting her power beyond that of a fledgling goddess. This holiday was renamed after the demise of Aroden.
ast.target:
艾奥梅黛

继承者升天节，最初称为“先驱日”，纪念艾奥梅黛被神阿拉兹尼选为他的先驱（从而取代阿拉兹尼）的日子，从而将她提升到超越初生女神的力量。这个节日在阿拉兹尼陨落后更名。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Mendev

Holiday in celebration of the continuing crusade against the demons of the Worldwound.
ast.target:
门德夫

庆祝对抗世界之伤恶魔的持续圣战的节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Ustalav

The Day of Silenced Whispers is an Ustalavic holiday celebrated every 9 Arodus marking the defeat of the Whispering Tyrant in 3827 AR by the coalition forces of the Shining Crusade and the liberation of the country after centuries of undead domination.
ast.target:
乌斯塔拉夫

“沉默低语日”是乌斯塔拉夫的一个节日，每年于阿罗达斯月9日庆祝，纪念3827年光辉十字军联盟击败低语者，以及该国在数个世纪的不死统治后获得解放。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Ilsurian, Varisia

Festival celebrating the founding by Ilsur of the town of Ilsurian in 4631 AR.
ast.target:
伊尔苏里安，瓦瑞西亚

庆祝伊尔苏于4631年建立伊尔苏里安镇的节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Aroden, Iomedae, Milani

The raucous, week-long festival known as Armasse is held each year beginning on 16 Arodus. The celebration \u2014 once dedicated to the god Aroden \u2014 is still important to the faithful of Iomedae, who use it to train commoners in combat, ordain apprentice clergy, pick squires for knights, and teach military history, hoping to prevent the mistakes of the past from being repeated. Among those not dedicated to the Inheritor the holiday has lost most of its religious significance since Aroden's death, tending now only toward wild partying, a fact that has precluded the diabolist authorities of Cheliax from prohibiting Armasse outright. Nevertheless, in places where the church of Asmodeus is openly allowed, it hosts special activities for its parishioners during the same week in an effort to counter the influence of the holiday. The city of Corentyn is especially known for its extravagant Armasse festivities.
ast.target:
阿拉兹尼，艾奥梅黛，米兰妮

被称为“阿玛斯”的喧闹、为期一周的节日每年从阿罗达斯月16日开始。这个曾经献给神阿拉兹尼的庆祝活动，对艾奥梅黛的信徒仍然重要，他们利用它来训练平民战斗、任命见习神职人员、为骑士挑选扈从，并教授军事历史，希望防止过去的错误重演。在那些不献身于继承者的人中，自阿拉兹尼死后，这个节日已失去了大部分宗教意义，现在只倾向于狂野的派对，这一事实阻止了切利亚斯的魔鬼主义当局完全禁止阿玛斯节。尽管如此，在公开允许阿斯摩蒂斯教会的地方，它会在同一周为其教区居民举办特别活动，以抵消该节日的影响。科伦廷市尤其以其奢华的阿玛斯节庆祝活动而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Quiet holiday honoring the birth of Saint Alika the Martyr.
ast.target:
科沃萨

纪念圣阿莉卡殉道者的安静节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Erastil

Archer's Day or Archerfeast is a holiday of the god Erastil held annually on the 3rd of Erastus. Despite the holiday's origins in the worship of Erastil, common country folk from the Lands of the Linnorm Kings to Taldor celebrate the height of summer with a day set aside for establishing new relationships, enjoying current camaraderie, and celebrating the gifts of the gods. Archery competitions are held frequently in which the men test their skill with the bow through progressively harder trials. The exact form of competition is different from place to place, and the winner is awarded a rack of elk horns and a quiver of blessed arrows. He is also given the title of "Protector", which he holds until the next year.

While the festival's traditions emphasize contests of marksmanship, most have expanded to exhibit talents of all types, from baking and storytelling to racing and mock combat. Aside from encouraging a fair-like atmosphere, many of the displays and competitions serve one of two secondary purposes: either as a way for merchants to show off their superior livestock and wares, or (more popularly) as a way for eligible men and women to show off to each other.

While the day's events at most Archerfeast fairs are filled with games, food, and crafts, the night brings dancing, drinking, pranks, and the crowning of the princes and princesses of spring and summer for the two single youths and two single adults who fared best in the day's events. The festivities continue late into the evening, but end promptly at midnight, so that in true Erastilian fashion the next day's responsibilities are not overly impeded. For those not of Erastil's flock, however, private parties, drinking, and trysting carry on long into the next morning.
ast.target:
埃拉斯蒂尔

射手节或射手盛宴是神埃拉斯蒂尔的节日，每年于埃拉斯图斯月3日举行。尽管该节日起源于对埃拉斯蒂尔的崇拜，但从林诺姆诸王之地到塔尔多的普通乡村居民都庆祝盛夏，将这一天用于建立新关系、享受现有友谊和庆祝诸神的恩赐。射箭比赛频繁举行，男子们通过越来越难的考验测试他们的弓术。比赛的具体形式因地而异，获胜者将获得一副麋鹿角和一袋祝福箭矢。他还被授予“保护者”称号，并保持到次年。虽然节日的传统强调射击技巧的竞赛，但大多数已扩展到展示各种才能，从烘焙和讲故事到赛跑和模拟战斗。除了鼓励类似集市的气氛外，许多展示和竞赛服务于两个次要目的之一：要么是商人展示他们优越的牲畜和商品的方式，要么（更常见地）是适龄男女互相展示的方式。虽然大多数射手盛宴集市的白日活动充满了游戏、食物和手工艺品，但夜晚则带来舞蹈、饮酒、恶作剧，以及为在白天活动中表现最佳的两名单身青年和两名单身成年人加冕春夏王子与公主。庆祝活动持续到深夜，但在午夜准时结束，以便以真正的埃拉斯蒂尔方式，不严重妨碍第二天的责任。然而，对于那些不属于埃拉斯蒂尔羊群的人来说，私人派对、饮酒和幽会会持续到次日清晨。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Founding Festival is a local Korvosan celebration marking the establishment of the city in 4407 AR. Held annually on 14 Erastus, the festival is a chance for the citizens to let off some steam, drink copiously, and watch magical light shows late into the night.
ast.target:
科沃萨

建城节是科沃萨当地的一个庆祝活动，纪念该城市于4407年建立。每年于埃拉斯图斯月14日举行，这个节日是市民们放松、大量饮酒和观看魔法灯光秀直至深夜的机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Razmiran

Items or people who have transgressed against the god-king of Razmiran are burned on this day.
ast.target:
拉兹米兰

在这一天，违反拉兹米兰神王法令的物品或人员将被焚烧。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Garundi

The Kianidi Festival is a week long event held annually between 15 and 21 Erastus by Garundi people everywhere. The Garundi have a powerful belief in belonging to a specific location in this world, with clans or tribes sometimes traveling for years in search of their true home. In these travels each individual will collect small mementos of the places she or he has visited in order to remember them and maintain a spiritual connection. During the Kianidi, a tribe will gather and display these mementos to the group. The best ones are chosen and made part of the clan or tribal history, something which Garundi feel is a great honor.
ast.target:
加仑迪人

基亚尼迪节是一个为期一周的活动，每年于埃拉斯图斯月15日至21日在所有加仑迪人中举行。加仑迪人坚信属于这个世界上的特定地点，氏族或部落有时会旅行数年寻找他们真正的家园。在这些旅行中，每个人都会收集所到之处的小纪念品，以记住它们并保持精神联系。在基亚尼迪节期间，部落会聚集并展示这些纪念品。最好的被选中并成为氏族或部落历史的一部分，加仑迪人认为这是一种巨大的荣誉。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Festival of Night's Return

Nidal

Celebrated throughout Nidal, this holiday involves the burning of effigies and self-flagellation.

Swallowtail Festival

Desna

Holiday celebrated with storytelling, feasting, and the release of butterflies.

Waning Light Festival

Segada

Also called Blessing of the Sun and Night of Spirits, participants bid farewell to the long days of sunshine with feasting, dancing, and music.
ast.target:
夜归节

尼达尔

在整个尼达尔庆祝，这个节日包括焚烧肖像和自鞭。

燕尾蝶节

黛丝娜

以讲故事、盛宴和释放蝴蝶庆祝的节日。

渐弱光节

塞加达

也称为太阳祝福和灵魂之夜，参与者以盛宴、舞蹈和音乐告别漫长的日照时光。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran, Cheliax, Galt, Isger

Signing Day is a Chelish holiday, dating back to the height of the empire. Observed on the second Oathday of Rova, this is the day on which new laws in the empire took effect. The significance of this day expanded over many years until imperial marriages, significant business arrangements and oaths of fealty were all conducted on this day.

Originally, the holiday began as a celebration of the mutual-defense pact between Cheliax, Isger, Galt and Andoran when the united nations threw off the shackles of Taldor, declaring themselves independent from the empire. Observances of the holiday vary, but often include firework displays, feats of strength, and public debates to showcase speaking and rhetorical skills.

As Cheliax degenerated to civil war and diabolism after 4606 AR, blood pacts and infernal contracts also began to be signed on this day. As a result of Cheliax's new affiliation, Andoran and Galt began to distance themselves from Cheliax and the original interpretation of the holiday. In Andoran it continues to be the day that most national laws take effect as well as being a traditional day of marriage, and the date on which new Steel Falcons are inducted.
ast.target:
安多安，切利亚斯，加尔特，伊斯格

签署日是切利亚斯的一个节日，可追溯到帝国鼎盛时期。在罗瓦月的第二个宣誓日庆祝，这一天是帝国新法律生效的日子。多年来，这个节日的意义不断扩大，直到帝国婚姻、重大商业安排和效忠誓言都在这一天进行。最初，这个节日是为了庆祝切利亚斯、伊斯格、加尔特和安多安之间的共同防御条约，当时这些联合国家摆脱了塔尔多的枷锁，宣布独立于帝国。节日的庆祝方式各不相同，但通常包括烟花表演、力量展示和公开辩论，以展示演讲和修辞技巧。随着4606年后切利亚斯陷入内战和魔鬼崇拜，血契和地狱契约也开始在这一天签署。由于切利亚斯的新联盟，安多安和加尔特开始与切利亚斯以及该节日的原始解释保持距离。在安多安，它仍然是大多数国家法律生效的日子，也是传统的结婚日，以及新钢铁猎鹰成员入会的日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Crabfest is a Korvosan holiday held on the first Wealday of Rova. It celebrates the return of the crabs from the cooler waters of the Jeggare River to their winter habitat in Conqueror's Bay, and is marked by crab boil feasts held throughout the city and its surrounding communities.
ast.target:
科沃萨

螃蟹节是科沃萨的一个节日，在罗瓦月的第一个工作日举行。它庆祝螃蟹从杰加雷河较冷的水域返回征服者湾的冬季栖息地，以全市及其周边社区举行的螃蟹煮宴为标志。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Irrisen

This "celebration of plenty" festival mocks the traditional harvest festivals celebrated in the region before Baba Yaga and her eternal winter descended upon the land.
ast.target:
伊里森

这个“丰盛庆典”节日嘲弄了在芭芭雅嘎及其永恒寒冬降临该地区之前该地区庆祝的传统丰收节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Ydersius

Once many holidays were celebrated by the faith of Ydersius, but today only this date has much significance.
ast.target:
伊德修斯

曾经伊德修斯信仰庆祝许多节日，但今天只有这个日期具有重大意义。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Jalmeri

Admani Upastuti is a Jalmeri holiday celebrated on the first full moon of Lamashan that marks the founding of Jalmeray as a Vudran colony.
ast.target:
贾尔梅人

阿德马尼·乌帕斯图提是贾尔梅人的一个节日，在拉马尚月的第一个满月庆祝，标志着贾尔梅作为乌德兰殖民地的建立。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Iomedae

Ascendance Day is an Iomedaean holiday, held on the 6th of Lamashan. The day marks the anniversary of the day Iomedae took the Test of the Starstone in the autumn of 3832 AR and ascended to godhood.

Celebration

The day is a joyous celebration for the faithful, with singing, pledging of friendships, and forgiving of old grudges.

To many, the Test of the Starstone represents the greatest of all challenges, yet for Iomedae it was one of three storied promotions in her rise from Aroden's herald to a goddess in her own right. On the 6th of Lamashan, the Inheritor's faithful observe the heroism of Iomedae's life before her moment of ascension and celebrate the anniversary of the apotheosis itself.

The celebration takes place in several stages. Early in the day, troupes of performers\u2014as often passionate amateurs as professionals\u2014stage morality plays featuring the Eleven Acts of Iomedae, the heroic near-miracles and sacrifices she made leading up to her trials in the Starstone Cathedral. Scripts vary by region, city, and even neighborhood, but despite differences in setting, performance medium, and word choice, the themes and morals are all the same.

As the day continues, the priests organize jousts and mock battles, allowing anyone to participate so long as she can demonstrate enough skill to not be a risk to herself or others. The winners of these contests then face tests of mental acuity such as solving riddles, deciphering philosophical quandaries, and answering questions of honor and justice. Those who prove themselves in both contests are awarded a white cloak\u2014representing the Inheritor at peace\u2014styled after Iomedae's own red garment to wear for the rest of the celebration. Feasting and singing follow the competitions, mirroring the jubilation that followed Iomedae's ascension. This is occasion for making pledges of friendship and forgiving enemies, and priests circulate about the crowd offering the Inheritor's blessing to those who do and providing a moment's counsel or mediation for those who need an extra nudge.

The celebration typically ends before midnight, and the following day the priests and previous day's champions gather up the blunted swords from the mock battles, sharpen them, and distribute them among the church's armory and those of like-minded organizations so that all may remain vigilant against evil and prepared to strike it down.
ast.target:
艾奥梅黛

升天日是艾奥梅黛的一个节日，于拉马尚月6日举行。这一天纪念艾奥梅黛在3832年秋季接受星石试炼并升格为神祇的周年纪念日。

庆祝活动

这一天对信徒来说是欢乐的庆祝，包括歌唱、缔结友谊和宽恕旧怨。对许多人来说，星石试炼代表了所有挑战中最伟大的一个，但对艾奥梅黛来说，这是她从阿拉兹尼的先驱晋升为独立女神的三个著名晋升之一。在拉马尚月6日，继承者的信徒们观察艾奥梅黛在她升格时刻之前生活中的英雄主义，并庆祝神化本身的周年纪念。庆祝活动分几个阶段进行。在一天早些时候，表演团体——通常是热情的业余爱好者和专业人士——上演关于艾奥梅黛十一项事迹的道德剧，这些是她通往星石大教堂试炼的英雄般的近乎奇迹和牺牲。剧本因地区、城市甚至街区而异，但尽管背景、表演媒介和措辞不同，主题和道德寓意都是相同的。随着一天的继续，牧师们组织长枪比武和模拟战斗，允许任何人参与，只要她能展示足够的技能，不会对自己或他人构成风险。这些比赛的获胜者随后面临智力敏锐度的测试，例如解谜、解读哲学难题以及回答关于荣誉和正义的问题。那些在两项比赛中都证明自己的人将获得一件白色斗篷——代表和平时期的继承者——仿照艾奥梅黛自己的红色服装，在庆祝活动的剩余时间穿着。盛宴和歌唱紧随比赛之后，反映了艾奥梅黛升格后的欢欣鼓舞。这是缔结友谊和宽恕敌人的场合，牧师们在人群中巡回，为那些这样做的人提供继承者的祝福，并为那些需要额外推动的人提供片刻的咨询或调解。庆祝活动通常在午夜前结束，第二天，牧师和前一天的冠军们收集模拟战斗中的钝剑，磨利它们，并将它们分发给教会的军械库和志同道合组织的军械库，以便所有人保持警惕对抗邪恶，并准备将其击倒。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Solku

Bastion Day is a two-day festival held annually on 19 and 20 Lamashan in the Katapeshi town of Solku honoring the founding of the town, when it is traditional to host a stranger from one noon until the next.
ast.target:
索尔库

堡垒节是一个为期两天的节日，每年于拉马尚月19日和20日在卡塔佩什小镇索尔库举行，纪念该镇的建立，传统上从一天正午到次日正午招待一位陌生人。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran, Druma, Taldor

Jestercap occurs at the end of the month of Lamashan, traditionally on the 27th (although a few regions have taken to moving the exact day around slightly so it always falls on the last Starday of the month, allowing people who wish to celebrate in excess to have the following day of rest to recover).

History

While Jestercap has been embraced with excited open arms by the gnome communities of the Inner Sea region, its original genesis is said to have been in one of Taldor's coastal cities not long after King Aspex the Even-Tongued broke from the nation, significantly weakening Taldor's power and beginning that nation's long decline. The holiday was originally intended to distract the distraught Taldan populace with a night of revelry and comedic entertainment, but the antics of jesters were simply not enough.

Over the course of the first few years, Jestercap evolved from a holiday of observation to a holiday of participation. Today, the holiday is a time where anyone can pull pranks or jokes or japes on companions, on neighbors, and (most typically) on rivals, with the understanding that provided no lasting harm is done, any humiliations inflicted before midnight are to be taken in stride. Of course, come morning the day after, there are inevitably jokes that went too far, and grudges and feuds borne from Jestercap antics have a way of lingering for months to follow.

In Religion

Followers of Chaldira Zuzaristan, a halfling deity of mischief, treat Jestercap as a holy day and their pranks \u2014 often elaborate and extravagant in nature and plotted for months in advance \u2014 as displays of their faith.
ast.target:
安多安，杜鲁玛，塔尔多

小丑帽节发生在拉马尚月底，传统上在27日（尽管一些地区已稍微调整具体日期，使其始终落在该月的最后一个星期六，以便希望过度庆祝的人有第二天休息恢复）。历史虽然小丑帽节受到内海地区侏儒社区的热烈欢迎，但其最初起源据说是在塔尔多的一个沿海城市，不久之后，舌如平匙的国王阿斯佩克斯脱离国家，大大削弱了塔尔多的力量并开始了该国的长期衰落。这个节日最初旨在用一夜的狂欢和喜剧娱乐来分散悲痛欲绝的塔尔多万众的注意力，但小丑的滑稽动作根本不够。在最初的几年里，小丑帽节从一个观察性的节日演变为一个参与性的节日。今天，这个节日是一个任何人都可以对同伴、邻居以及（最典型地）对手进行恶作剧、玩笑或戏谑的时刻，前提是不造成持久伤害，在午夜前施加的任何羞辱都应坦然接受。当然，第二天早上，不可避免地会有一些玩笑过头，从小丑帽节恶作剧中产生的怨恨和宿怨往往会持续数月。在宗教方面，查尔迪拉·祖扎里斯坦（一位恶作剧的半身人神祇）的追随者将小丑帽节视为圣日，他们的恶作剧——通常精心策划且奢华，提前数月策划——被视为他们信仰的展示。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Zon-Kuthon, Nidal

A harvest festival signifying the centuries of Nidalese ancestors protected by Zon-Kuthon. The ceremonial tables are made of human bones of community members from past generations.
ast.target:
宗-库松，尼达尔

一个丰收节，象征着尼达尔祖先数个世纪以来受宗-库松保护的岁月。仪式性的桌子由过去几代社区成员的人骨制成。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Absalom

The second of two local festivals where kite-battlers compete.
ast.target:
艾巴萨罗姆

两个地方性风筝对战节中的第二个。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Galt

Marks the beginning of the Red Revolution.
ast.target:
加尔特

标志着红色革命的开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Sivanah

The holiday known as Seven Veils, which takes place on the 23rd of Neth in most realms of the Inner Sea region, is a celebration of the region's diversity \u2014 a time when social boundaries break down even further in a day-long event filled with dancing, feasting, and courting. The evening traditionally closes out with the Seven Veil masquerade, a ball wherein the participants wear disguises that hide their race or gender (often using minor magical trinkets and spells) or disguise these features as entirely new characteristics. At the end of the ball, the participants remove their disguises to their partners, often with unpredictable and sometimes delightfully awkward results. Traditionalists and conservative minds often find the Seven Veils masquerades to be scandalous or off-putting, yet they remain particularly popular in most of the larger cities of the land.

Historians note that the original "Dance of the Seven Veils" has a much different genesis than one promoting diversity \u2014 the mysterious cult of Sivanah, goddess of illusions, mystery, and reflections, is generally cited as the source of this festival, and indeed, worshippers of the goddess (herself known as the Seventh Veil) count the 23rd of Neth as one of their most sacred of days. What rituals the church of Sivanah performs on this date, however, are unknown to outsiders, for the cult enjoys its secrets. This secrecy has, unsurprisingly, given rise to all manner of sinister rumour, yet when Seven Veils rolls around each year, its eager participants are quick to set aside rumour in preference for the night's fun and games.
ast.target:
西瓦娜

被称为“七纱节”的节日，在内海地区的大多数领域于尼思月23日举行，是庆祝该地区多样性的时刻——社会界限进一步打破，在为期一天的活动中充满舞蹈、盛宴和求爱。晚上传统上以七纱化装舞会结束，参与者穿着隐藏种族或性别的伪装（通常使用小型魔法饰品和法术），或将这些特征伪装成全新的特征。在舞会结束时，参与者向他们的伴侣卸下伪装，结果往往不可预测，有时令人愉快地尴尬。传统主义者和保守思想者常常认为七纱化装舞会令人震惊或反感，但它们在该地区大多数大城市中仍然特别受欢迎。历史学家指出，最初的“七纱之舞”的起源与促进多样性大不相同——西瓦娜的神秘教派，幻觉、神秘和反射女神，通常被认为是这个节日的来源，事实上，这位女神（她本人被称为第七纱）的信徒将尼思月23日视为他们最神圣的日子之一。然而，西瓦娜教会在这一天举行什么仪式，外界不得而知，因为教派喜欢保守秘密。不出所料，这种保密引发了各种邪恶的谣言，但当每年七纱节到来时，热切的参与者们迅速抛开谣言，转而享受夜晚的乐趣和游戏。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Nethys

Abjurant Day occurs on 8 Neth and is known as a day of cooperation between neighbors to shore up mutual defenses and train allies in magic. Potential apprentices are often tested on the day.
ast.target:
内西斯

防护日发生在尼思月8日，被称为邻居之间合作加强共同防御和训练盟友魔法的日子。潜在的学徒通常在这一天接受测试。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Great Fire Remembrance is a holiday celebrated on each 13 Neth in the Varisian city of Korvosa. It commemorates the Great Fire of 4429 AR, which devastated the then still fledgling Chelish colony of Fort Korvosa. On this somber day, most of the city shuts down and people generally remain at home. It has become tradition not to light any fires (not even cooking fires) on Great Fire Remembrance.
ast.target:
科沃萨

大火纪念日是瓦瑞西亚城市科沃萨每年内斯月13日庆祝的节日，纪念4429年的大火，这场大火摧毁了当时尚处于雏形的切利亚斯殖民地——科沃萨堡。在这个哀悼日，城市大部分区域关闭，人们通常留在家中。传统上，在大火纪念日不点燃任何火焰（甚至包括烹饪用火）。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Cheliax, Asmodeus, Milani

Observed on 14 of Neth, Even-Tongued Day was once a day of joy and celebration in Cheliax, but has become instead one of mourning.

Originally, the date marked the conquest of Aspex the Even-Tongued, who brought the nations of Galt, Andoran and Isger under Chelish control. Since the death of Aroden and the loss of these nations, the holiday instead marks the loss of territory and glory once held by Cheliax. Oaths are sometimes made, typically to Asmodeus, and rarely of a pleasant nature (such as the reclaiming of the lost empire and vengeance against treacherous former allies).

Citizens wear black on this day, public speaking is forbidden, and old feuds and vendettas are rekindled.
ast.target:
切利亚斯、阿斯摩蒂斯、米拉尼

在内斯月14日庆祝的“巧言之日”曾是切利亚斯的欢乐庆典，但如今已变成哀悼之日。

最初，这个日期标志着“巧言者”阿斯佩克斯的征服，他将伽尔特、安多安和伊斯格纳入切利亚斯统治。自从艾奥登之死和这些领土丧失后，这个节日转而纪念切利亚斯曾经拥有的领土和荣耀的失落。人们有时会立下誓言，通常是对阿斯摩蒂斯，而且很少是愉快的性质（例如收复失落的帝国和对背信弃义的昔日盟友复仇）。

公民在这一天穿黑色衣服，禁止公开演讲，旧日仇怨和世仇被重新点燃。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Nethys

A holy day to followers of Nethys, Evoking Day is full of vibrant explosions, skillful wielding of spells, and much dancing. Evoking Day is observed on the 18th of Neth, and while this holiday is mostly celebrated in Garund, temples dedicated to Nethys host celebrations throughout the Inner Sea region. Traditional celebrations of Evoking Day have changed over the thousands of years since its first incarnation, but to this day every occurrence of Evoking Day still features a grand meal shared by celebrants during the afternoon and a wondrous exhibition of brilliant and explosive magic once the sun sets. These days, such colorful magical displays are augmented with fireworks of a dozen different colors and patterns.

In temples of Nethys dedicated to revering evocation magic, priests and prominent arcanists participate in spell duels where each contestant stands on a raised platform and takes turns trying to incapacitate her opponent. The magic wielded in theses duels favors the flashy over the dangerous, but clerics of Nethys are on hand to treat any injuries. These duels gather large crowds eager to lend their applause to their favorite contestant.

It is also during this festival when wizards who worship Nethys open their spellbooks to others who share their craft. Wizards normally guard their spellbooks with their lives and covet the eldritch information therein, but on Evoking Day these wizards meet with one another prior to the afternoon feast to share their spells just as they prepare to share a grand meal.

Though Evoking Day is primarily a day of grand magic, those with no spellcasting talent still flock to local temples of Nethys to partake in the shared feast and flashy evening displays of magic and fireworks. Between the meal and into the night, celebrants wear black-and-white robes and perform joyous dances meant to give thanks to the wonders Nethys brought to humankind. These dances are grand affairs involving dozens of dancers all spinning and clapping to the accompanying music as their black-and-white robes fan out around them with each spin. As night descends and the fireworks and magical displays begin, the dancing rises to a climax erupting in shouts and calls to Nethys with each thunderous boom.
ast.target:
内西斯

对内西斯信徒而言，唤能日是充满绚烂爆炸、娴熟施法和大量舞蹈的圣日。唤能日在内斯月18日庆祝，虽然这个节日主要在迦伦德庆祝，但内西斯神庙在整个内海地区都会举办庆典。唤能日的传统庆祝方式自其首次出现以来已历经数千年变迁，但至今每次唤能日仍包括下午的盛大聚餐和日落后的精彩爆炸魔法展示。如今，这些多彩的魔法展示还辅以十几种不同颜色和图案的烟花。

在专门崇敬塑能魔法的内西斯神庙中，祭司和著名奥术师会进行法术对决，每位参赛者站在高台上轮流试图使对手失去行动能力。这些对决中使用的魔法更注重华丽而非危险，但内西斯牧师随时准备治疗任何伤害。这些对决吸引了大批观众，他们热切地为喜爱的参赛者鼓掌。

在这个节日期间，崇拜内西斯的法师也会向同行开放他们的法术书。法师通常以生命守护法术书并珍视其中的奥术知识，但在唤能日，这些法师会在下午盛宴前会面分享法术，就像准备分享盛宴一样。

尽管唤能日主要是盛大魔法的日子，但没有施法天赋的人也会涌向当地的内西斯神庙，参与共享盛宴和夜晚的魔法与烟花表演。从用餐到夜晚，庆祝者穿着黑白相间的长袍，表演欢快的舞蹈，以感谢内西斯带给人类的奇迹。这些舞蹈是盛大的活动，涉及数十名舞者随着音乐旋转和拍手，他们的黑白长袍随着每次旋转展开。随着夜幕降临，烟花和魔法表演开始，舞蹈达到高潮，伴随着每一声雷鸣般的轰鸣，人们向内西斯呼喊。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Irrisen

In the Irriseni Baptism of Ice, an annual fertility festival held from the 24th to the 30th of Neth, locals parade all children born during the year through the town in fine clothes. In most towns, the festival ends with a symbolic sacrifice of a child to the cold. However, in Whitethrone and Irrisen's provincial capitals, a peasant child is killed through exposure.
ast.target:
伊瑞森

在伊瑞森的“冰之洗礼”中，这是一个从内斯月24日到30日举行的年度生育节，当地人让所有年内出生的孩子穿着华丽衣服在城镇中游行。在大多数城镇，节日以象征性地牺牲一个孩子给寒冷而结束。然而，在白王座和伊瑞森的省会城市，一个农民孩子会被冻死。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Nethys

Transmutatum is one of the three major holidays of the church of Nethys, on 28th of Neth. It is a day of reflection and self-improvement. Many followers of Nethys begin research and crafting projects on this day.
ast.target:
内西斯

变形节是内西斯教会的三大主要节日之一，在内斯月28日。这是一个反思和自我提升的日子。许多内西斯信徒在这一天开始研究和制作项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional feast; time for courting and spending time with friends.
ast.target: 传统盛宴；求爱和与朋友共度时光的时节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Zon-Kuthon, Nidal

Commemorating the Midnight Lord's gift of shadow animals.
ast.target:
宗-库松、尼达尔

纪念午夜领主赐予的阴影动物。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Korvosa's Pseudodragon Festival, a holiday celebrated annually on 7 Kuthona, marks the winter migration of wild pseudodragons from the Mindspin Mountains to Conqueror's Bay, which inspires the creatures already in the city\u2014even those domesticated\u2014to play with their wild kin in the skies over the city. Locals mark the day with a joyous inebriation.
ast.target:
科沃萨

科沃萨的伪龙节是每年库索纳月7日庆祝的节日，标志着野生伪龙从明斯宾山脉迁徙到征服者湾，这激发了城市中已有的伪龙——即使是驯养的——与野生同类在城市上空嬉戏。当地人用欢乐的醉酒来纪念这一天。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Cayden Cailean

Much like the god to whom it is dedicated, the Caydenite holiday of Ascension Day is generally celebrated in a very informal style. Occurring annually on 11 Kuthona, it commemorates the day Cayden Cailean passed the Test of the Starstone and ascended to godhood in 2765 AR. In all likelihood, the 11th of Kuthona is not the exact date on which it actually happened, but since the god was dead drunk when it happened, it will probably be never known.
ast.target:
凯登·凯连

与它所献身的神祇一样，凯登派的升天日通常以非常非正式的方式庆祝。每年库索纳月11日举行，纪念凯登·凯连在2765年通过星石试炼并升格为神。很可能库索纳月11日并非实际发生的准确日期，但由于这位神祇当时烂醉如泥，可能永远无法知晓。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Naderi

Holiday celebrating Naderi's ascension. Celebrations are typically understated but include readings of The Lay of Arden and Lysena.
ast.target:
纳德里

庆祝纳德里升天的节日。庆祝活动通常低调，但包括朗读《阿尔登与莉塞娜之歌》。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Groetus

Cultists of Groetus perform an hour's silence at dusk on the last day of the year and seek guidance from their god about the End Time.
ast.target:
格罗图斯

格罗图斯的信徒在一年最后一天的黄昏进行一小时的静默，并向他们的神寻求关于末日的指引。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Not all of Golarion's holidays and festivals are times of rejoicing and delight. Holidays worshiped by dark and sinister cults and religions tend to be hidden affairs, their rituals and ceremonies involving cruelties and vile practices that send shivers of fear through gentler society. Scholars suspect that the Night of the Pale\u2014a holiday that traditionally takes place on the last day of the year, the 31st of Kuthona\u2014has links to several sinister religions, but today no one church has specific association with the event. Nonetheless, the Night of the Pale is an event that many look forward to all year, whether in fear or excitement.

On the Night of the Pale, it is said that the ghosts of those who died during the previous year manifest upon the world and come to visit the homes they lived in during life. Although some might think that the chance of seeing even the shade of a dearly departed one might be a blessing, the Night of the Pale is not a time for tearful reunions, for these ghosts, tradition says, do not return out of love for those they left behind but out of darker compulsions. Lingering jealousy, unfinished arguments, or the simmering need for revenge are said to be what compels the dead to return to torment the living on the Night of the Pale.

The evening of this night in many communities is celebrated by a morbid feast, the food prepared with themes revolving around graveyards, the dead, and other spooky traditions. This feast, on one level, helps the celebrants to make light of their fears while sharing good company with similarly nervous neighbors, but at another level is believed to placate vengeful spirits as toasts are raised to the memories of the recently departed. These feasts include retellings of favorite memories of the departed, in hopes of reminding the approaching ghosts of brighter and kinder memories than those that compel them to return. The feast always ends at least an hour before midnight in order to give participants time to return home, decorate doors and windows with salt and other trinkets taken from the feasting table (salted bread baked into crook-like shapes are a favorite, as these can be hung from doorknobs and eaves) to ward off evil spirits, and hide in their bedrooms until dawn. Brave youths and adventurers often deliberately stay out after midnight, either to dare the ghosts to challenge them or simply for the thrill of bucking tradition. Every Night of the Pale, it seems, there are disappearances among those who stay out after midnight, although whether these vanishings are the result of dissatisfied locals taking the opportunity to run away from home, murderers or wild animals or other mundane dangers, or the vengeful spirits carrying off their victims depends upon the circumstances.

The morning after a Night of the Pale is also the first day of the new year\u2014a time that many celebrate more as a relief for surviving the night before than in anticipation of what the new year might bring, although regional preferences for how this day is celebrated vary enough that no single tradition holds over the other. Save, of course, the lingering fears of what dread spirits might come knocking upon warded doors one year away...
ast.target:
并非格拉利昂所有的节日和庆典都是欢乐和愉快的时光。黑暗邪恶教派和宗教崇拜的节日往往是隐秘的活动，其仪式和典礼涉及残忍和邪恶的做法，令温和社会不寒而栗。学者怀疑“苍白之夜”——一个传统上在一年最后一天，即库索纳月31日举行的节日——与几个邪恶宗教有关，但如今没有哪个教会与该事件有特定关联。尽管如此，苍白之夜是许多人全年期待的事件，无论是出于恐惧还是兴奋。

在苍白之夜，据说前一年死去的人的鬼魂会在世界上显现，并拜访他们生前居住的家。尽管有些人可能认为即使看到已故亲人的影子也是一种祝福，但苍白之夜并非泪眼重逢的时刻，因为这些鬼魂，传统上说，并非出于对身后之人的爱而归来，而是出于更黑暗的冲动。残留的嫉妒、未了的争吵或酝酿的复仇欲望被认为是驱使死者归来折磨生者的原因。

在许多社区，这个夜晚以一场阴森的盛宴庆祝，食物以墓地、死者和其他恐怖传统为主题。这场盛宴一方面帮助庆祝者以轻松的态度面对恐惧，同时与同样紧张的邻居分享陪伴，但另一方面被认为能安抚复仇的幽灵，因为人们会为最近逝者的记忆举杯。这些盛宴包括重述对逝者最喜爱的回忆，希望提醒接近的鬼魂那些比驱使他们归来的更光明、更仁慈的记忆。盛宴总是在午夜前至少一小时结束，以便参与者有时间回家，用盐和从宴席上拿来的其他小饰品（烤成钩状形状的咸面包是首选，可以挂在门把手和屋檐上）装饰门窗以驱散恶灵，并躲进卧室直到黎明。勇敢的年轻人和冒险者经常故意在午夜后逗留，要么是挑战鬼魂，要么只是为了打破传统的刺激。每个苍白之夜，似乎总有人在午夜后逗留时失踪，尽管这些失踪是当地不满者趁机离家出走、谋杀犯或野生动物或其他日常危险，还是复仇的幽灵带走受害者，取决于具体情况。

苍白之夜后的早晨也是新年的第一天——许多人庆祝这一天更多是庆幸熬过了前一夜，而不是期待新年可能带来的东西，尽管这一天的庆祝方式因地区而异，没有单一的传统占主导地位。当然，除了对一年后可怕幽灵可能再次敲响被守护的大门的挥之不去的恐惧……

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Alseta

The changing of the year is celebrated with the forgiveness of old debts and grudges, and embracing new opportunities.
ast.target:
阿尔塞塔

新年的更替通过宽恕旧债和宿怨，以及拥抱新机遇来庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Desna

The Ritual of Stardust is one of the few formal religious holidays in honor of the goddess Desna. It is held on both the summer and winter solstices.

Followers of the Song of Spheres gather at dusk and light enormous bonfires and hold feasts, watching the sparks and embers float out into the darkening sky. After it is fully dark, the celebrants chant and sing songs as they watch the fires burn low. When only embers remain, sand mixed with ground star gems (either star rubies, star sapphires, or rose quartz) is thrown on them or into the air downwind. At this point it is common to make proclamations of love and friendship and of promised journeys to come. The twinkling of the sand is thought to mirror the night sky and demonstrate Desna's witnessing of these pronouncements.
ast.target:
黛丝娜

星尘仪式是少数纪念女神黛丝娜的正式宗教节日之一。它在夏至和冬至举行。

“天球之歌”的信徒在黄昏聚集，点燃巨大的篝火并举行盛宴，看着火花和余烬飘入渐暗的天空。完全黑暗后，庆祝者吟唱圣歌和歌曲，看着火焰燃尽。当只剩下余烬时，混合了磨碎的星宝石（星红宝石、星蓝宝石或蔷薇石英）的沙子被扔到余烬上或顺风抛入空中。此时，人们常会宣告爱情、友谊和即将到来的旅程。沙子的闪烁被认为映照夜空，并展示黛丝娜见证了这些宣告。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Erastil

This holy week to the god Erastil is a time of heavy work in the fields for farmers.
ast.target:
埃拉斯蒂尔

献给神祇埃拉斯蒂尔的这一圣周是农民在田间辛勤劳作的时节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Norgorber

Day marking the apotheosis of the Reaper of Reputation.
ast.target:
诺格巴

纪念“名誉收割者”神化的日子。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Gruhastha

Celebration of the revelation of the Azvadeva Pujila, with gifts of books, celebrations of knowledge, blessing of animals, and a vegetarian feast.
ast.target:
格鲁哈斯塔

庆祝《阿兹瓦德瓦·普吉拉》的启示，包括赠送书籍、庆祝知识、祝福动物和素食盛宴。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran

A market day that focuses on unusual crafts and offers games to children who dress up for the occasion.
ast.target:
安多安

一个专注于不寻常工艺品的集市日，并为盛装打扮的儿童提供游戏。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Korvosa

Yearly festival in which contestants try to break through the magical wards protecting the Academae.
ast.target:
科沃萨

年度节日，参赛者试图突破保护学术院的魔法屏障。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Andoran

Silverglazer Sunday is a two-part Andoren national festival that is held on the last Sunday of Arodus and the first Sunday of Rova every year. Celebrants spend the two Sundays fishing, holding swimming competitions, and making enormous puppets.
ast.target:
安多安

银光星期日是一个分为两部分的安多安国家节日，每年在阿罗登月的最后一个星期日和罗瓦月的第一个星期日举行。庆祝者在这两个星期日钓鱼、举行游泳比赛和制作巨大的木偶。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Qadira

Batul al-Alim is a holiday celebrated on the last Oathday of Calistril in Qadira. It commemorates the birthday of the popular romantic poet of the same name.
ast.target:
卡迪拉

巴图尔·阿利姆是卡迪拉每年卡利斯特里尔月最后一个誓约日庆祝的节日，纪念同名的流行浪漫诗人的诞辰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar of the world of Eberron.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Tain Gala is a notable event held on the first Far of each month in Sharn.
ast.target: 泰恩盛会是在夏尔每月第一个法尔日举行的著名活动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meditation ceremony for Seekers (also called Ascension Day).
ast.target: 寻求者的冥想仪式（也称为升天日）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The longest night of the year.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purified new year; a night for spiritual vigil and guarding against evil.
