ast.target: 净化者的新年；进行属灵守望和抵御邪恶的夜晚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A day of remembrance; Ice sculptures are created (and destroyed) to commemorate the destruction of the Glass Tower on 9 Olarune in 918 by abjurers.
ast.target: 纪念日；制作（并摧毁）冰雕以纪念918年奥拉鲁恩月9日由咒法学派摧毁的玻璃塔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day each year, the Purified celebrate the lives and sacrifice of all followers of the Flame who died while fighting evil and protecting the faithful.
ast.target: 每年的这一天，净化者庆祝并纪念所有在与邪恶战斗和保护信徒中牺牲的火焰追随者的生命与牺牲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In commemoration of the destruction of the nation of Cyre, those who survived gather to remember the loss of their kingdom on this date in the year 994.
ast.target: 为纪念坎纳斯的毁灭，幸存者在这一天聚集，缅怀他们在994年失去的王国。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day, the Silver Flame work, give gifts, and partake in joyous celebration out of thankfulness for the new planting season and the birth of Tira Miron - the Voice of the Silver Flame.
ast.target: 在这一天，银焰工作者劳作、赠送礼物并参与欢乐的庆祝，以感谢新的种植季节和蒂拉·米隆——银焰之声的诞生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Sovereign Host enjoys this festival of peace, and of setting aside differences, in the name of Dol Arrah.
ast.target: 至高诸神以多·阿拉之名享受这个和平与搁置分歧的节日。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Seminary graduations and breaking grounds for new churches are common on this day as the Silver Flame recalls their declarations of independent faith and the construction of their first cathedral on this special day each year.
ast.target: 神学院毕业典礼和新教堂的奠基在这一天很常见，因为银焰每年在这个特殊的日子纪念他们独立信仰的宣告和第一座大教堂的建设。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An old and misunderstood, yet immensely popular, holiday wherein followers of the Silver Flame gather to share pastries and treats created by bakers within their fold.
ast.target: 一个古老且被误解但极为流行的节日，银焰追随者聚集分享由他们中的面包师制作的糕点和甜点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Sovereign Host celebrate knowledge on this day with lectures and sermons.Secular institutions hold graduation and commencement ceremonies on this date, as do the monastic schools of the Silver Flame.In Sharn this has become a common secular holiday, wherein even non-devout members of the Five Nations attend lectures and sermons held by the priests of Aureon on philosophical, historical, and a range of other topics - including discussions on the nature of the gods.
ast.target: 至高诸神在这一天通过讲座和布道庆祝知识。世俗机构在这一天举行毕业和开学典礼，银焰的修道院学校也是如此。在夏尔，这已成为一个普遍的世俗节日，即使是非虔诚的五国成员也会参加奥雷昂祭司举办的关于哲学、历史和其他一系列主题的讲座和布道——包括关于神祇本质的讨论。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A controversial holiday outside of the Silver Flame faith, on this day the Purified honor the Silver Flame for the promise of paradise. They also honor (without worship) the Sovereign Host for having created the world, before stepping aside to allow the Flame its rightful place as the last god of Eberron.
ast.target: 在银焰信仰之外一个有争议的节日，这一天净化者尊崇银焰，因其应许了天堂。他们也尊崇（但不崇拜）至高诸神创造了世界，然后退让，让火焰成为艾伯伦最后的神祇。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This Sovereign Host festival, dedicated to Dol Dorn, is marked by gladiatorial and athletic contests. 

In Sharn, festival celebrations occur throughout the temple districts with events culminating in a combined contest of champions at the Cornerstone Arena.
ast.target:
这个献给多·多恩的至高诸神节日以角斗和体育竞赛为标志。

在夏尔，节日庆祝活动遍布神庙区，最终在基石竞技场举行冠军联合竞赛。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day in 914, the Church of the Silver Flame officially assumed control of the government of Thrane. On each anniversary, the Purified give thanks for their just rule, while also honoring the memory of King Thalin, whose death paved the way for their governance.
ast.target: 在914年的这一天，银焰教会正式接管了瑟雷恩的政府。在每个周年纪念日，净化者感谢他们的公正统治，同时也纪念国王萨林之死，这为他们的治理铺平了道路。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Commemoration of both the couatl sacrifice and the entry, thousands of years ago, of the Silver Flame into Eberron mark this highest of holy days. The vast majority of Purified spend this day in prayer and observance.
ast.target: 纪念羽蛇牺牲以及数千年前银焰进入艾伯伦，标志着这个最神圣的日子。绝大多数净化者在这一天祈祷和守夜。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Legend tells of King Galifar II's fascination with aerial scouts and cavalry. The evolution of this annual contest took centuries, but has given Sharn an exotic and well anticipated event involving beasts and their riders in a symbiotic quest for glory* over a course that finds them weaving through the spires of the city. 



*the winner also receives 500gp and a land grant located elsewhere in Breland.
ast.target:
传说讲述国王加利法二世对空中侦察和骑兵的迷恋。这项年度竞赛的演变历经数个世纪，但为夏尔带来了一项异国情调且备受期待的活动，涉及野兽及其骑手在穿越城市尖塔的赛道上进行共生追求荣耀的竞赛。

*获胜者还将获得500金币和位于布兰德国其他地区的土地赠予。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Sovereign Host celebrate Balinor with communal hunts of dangerous creatures. 

In Sharn, a dangerous beast*, whose transport to the city was arranged by the priests of Balinor, is released into the Depths of the Lower-City. Open to any who would participate (and pay an entry fee in the form of a 5gp donation), the victor must return with the beast's head to receive a 500gp purse, local fame, and the blessing of Balinor. 



*often a singular beast, it can be several - which then requires the victor to return with the most skins.
ast.target:
至高诸神通过集体狩猎危险生物来庆祝巴林诺。

在夏尔，一只危险的野兽*由巴林诺祭司安排运送到城市，被释放到下城深处。任何愿意参加并支付5金币报名费的人都可以参与，胜利者必须带回野兽的头颅，以获得500金币奖金、本地声望和巴林诺的祝福。

*通常是一只野兽，但也可以是几只，此时胜利者需要带回最多的兽皮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Commemorating the conclusion of the lycanthropic purge (832 YK - 880 YK), on Victory Day the adult faithful of the Silver Flame attend sermons on triumph, defeat, and the somewhat questionable methods utilized by the templars during the purge - while the children of the faithful act out great battles with toy swords.
ast.target: 纪念狼人清洗（832年-880年）的结束，在胜利日，成年的银焰信徒参加关于胜利、失败以及圣殿骑士在清洗中使用的可疑方法的布道，而信徒的孩子们则用玩具剑表演伟大的战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Honoring the memory of Fathen, a great hero of the Silver Crusade (832 YK - 880 YK), who, in the last days of the purge, was torn apart by wererats on the streets of North Market. Faithful gather on this day at the Shrine of Fathen the Martyr to listen to a sermon from the priest of High Hope. This holiday is often uncomfortable and tense for shifter communities in Sharn.
ast.target: 纪念法森，银焰十字军（832年-880年）的伟大英雄，他在清洗的最后几天在北市场的街道上被鼠人撕碎。信徒在这一天聚集在殉道者法森神殿，聆听至高希望祭司的布道。这个节日对于夏尔的变换者社区来说常常令人不适和紧张。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
A feast of community in the name of Boldrei, extravagant parties are often held on this holiday and it has also become the traditional day for elections. 

In Sharn, a great feast is held at the Pavilion of the Host with goods and services donated\xA0 from local merchants, as well as House Ghallanda. Many grand parties, some quite astonishing in their opulence, are hosted by the wealthiest members of varying districts - often in competition with one another for social standing.
ast.target:
以博尔德雷之名的社区盛宴，这个节日经常举行盛大派对，也成为传统的选举日。

在夏尔，一场盛大的盛宴在诸神亭举行，由当地商人和加拉达家族捐赠物品和服务。许多盛大的派对，有些奢华得惊人，由不同地区最富有的成员举办，常常为了社会地位相互竞争。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each year on The Ascension, followers reaffirm their faith and give thanks as well as attend blessing ceremonies at temples throughout the city - the grandest of which occurs at the Cathedral of the Cleansing Flame. All of this is to honor the sacrifice of Tira Miron, the Voice of the Flame, without which there would be no Church of the Silver Flame. Contributions to their community on this day are a high priority for the faithful.
ast.target: 每年在升天日，追随者重申信仰并感恩，同时参加全市神庙的祝福仪式——其中最盛大的在净化火焰大教堂举行。这一切都是为了纪念蒂拉·米隆——火焰之声的牺牲，没有她就不会有银焰教会。在这一天为社区做贡献是信徒的首要任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With the The Fury (the Sovereign of Passion and Madness) reaching the height of her power on this night, people find it difficult to control or restrain their impulses - once the sun sets, public revelry in the streets climbs to joyous or, all too often, dangerous levels, calming only as the sun rises on the following morning.
ast.target: 随着狂怒女神（激情与疯狂之主）在这个夜晚达到力量顶峰，人们发现难以控制或抑制自己的冲动——太阳落山后，街头的公共狂欢上升到欢乐或往往危险的水平，直到第二天早晨太阳升起才平静下来。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Though one of the least high holy days, it is marked by brief prayers and church services in the honor of the birth of Saint Voltros - the first paladin called to only serve the Silver Flame.
ast.target: 虽然是最不重要的圣日之一，但以简短的祈祷和教堂仪式纪念圣伏特罗斯的诞生——第一位被召唤只侍奉银焰的圣骑士。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On this day in 996, the Treaty of Thronehold was signed, formally ending the Last War. Annual celebratory feasts are held throughout the Five Nations to mark this auspicious and long-awaited event.
ast.target: 在996年的这一天，《王座条约》签署，正式结束了最后战争。五国各地举行年度庆祝盛宴，以纪念这个吉祥且期待已久的事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In accordance with scripture, on this day the Purified steel themselves against wickedness, both without and within, through repentance and fasting. Children, elderly, and the sick are required only to give up their favorite foods for the day.
ast.target: 根据经文，在这一天，净化者通过忏悔和禁食来抵御内外邪恶。儿童、老人和病人只需放弃他们最喜欢的食物一天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As dark magic dominates over these three days of the Long Shadows, the myth of Sovereign Lord Aureon's stolen shadow is forefront in the minds of the people. Most will spend these days indoors huddled around the warmth of a fire, but those few who worship the dark deity use this time to prey upon the weak and the foolish.
ast.target: 在长影的三天里，黑暗魔法占主导地位，至高主奥雷昂被盗影子的神话在人们心中最为突出。大多数人会待在室内，围坐在火边取暖，但少数崇拜黑暗神祇的人利用这段时间猎杀弱者和愚者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Originally called Khyber's Eve, the Purified spend the night in intense prayer and spiritual vigilance against the, according to scripture, "thinning of the bonds that hold the demon lords in Khyber" between now (the beginning of winter) and the solstice. Quests and crusades often begin on Khybersef.
ast.target: 最初称为凯伯之夜，净化者整夜进行强烈祈祷和属灵警惕，因为根据经文，从现在（冬季开始）到冬至，“束缚凯伯中恶魔领主的纽带正在变薄”。任务和十字军东征常常在凯伯塞夫开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spring equinox is when the day and the night are equally as long, and are getting longer.
ast.target: 春分是昼夜等长且白昼渐长的时刻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The autumn equinox is when the day and the night are equally as long, and are getting shorter.
ast.target: 秋分是昼夜等长且白昼渐短的时刻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar of the realm of Barovia, home of Strahd.
ast.target: 斯特拉德所在的巴罗维亚领域的日历。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Winter Solstice is the day of the year with the least time between sunrise and sunset. Many western cultures consider it the official date of winter.
ast.target: 冬至是一年中日出与日落间隔最短的一天。许多西方文化将其视为冬季的正式开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Summer Solstice is the day of the year with the most time between 
sunrise and sunset. Many western cultures consider it the official date
 of summer.
ast.target: 夏至是一年中日出与日落间隔最长的一天。许多西方文化将其视为夏季的正式开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Spring Equinox,
also called the Vernal Equinox, is the day between the winter and
summer solstices where the day is the exact same length as the night.
Many western cultures consider it the official date of Spring.
ast.target: 春分，又称昼夜平分点，是介于冬至与夏至之间昼夜等长的日子。许多西方文化将其视为春季的正式开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Autumnal Equinox,
also called the Fall Equinox, is the midpoint between the summer and
winter solstices, where the day is the exact same length as the night.
Many western cultures consider it the official date of Autumn.
ast.target: 秋分，又称昼夜平分点，是介于夏至与冬至之间昼夜等长的日子。许多西方文化将其视为秋季的正式开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New Year's day marks the date of a new year.
ast.target: 元旦标志着新一年的开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar of the world of Wildemount.
ast.target: 威尔德蒙特世界的日历。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The first day of the new year is also the holy day of the Changebringer, as the old year gives way to a new path.

In Tal'Dorei, Emon celebrates New Dawn with a grand midnight feast, which commonly features a short play celebrating the changes witnessed in the past year.

On the Menagerie Coast, people celebrate by having a feast on the shore at dusk to watch the sunset. They feast and discuss their hopes for the new year until the sun rises.
ast.target:
新年的第一天也是变革之神的圣日，旧岁让位于新途。

在塔尔'多雷，埃蒙以盛大的午夜盛宴庆祝新黎明，通常会上演一部短剧，回顾过去一年的变迁。

在梅纳杰里海岸，人们于黄昏时分在海滨举行盛宴，观看日落，畅谈对新年的期望直至日出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This holiday is up to the calendar owner to decide what it is for! :)
ast.target: 此节日的意义由日历所有者自行决定！:)

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The holy day of the Stormlord is one of the most raucous holidays in Emon. Thousands of spectators attend the annual Godsbrawl, which is held in the fighting ring within the Temple of the Stormlord. The people root for their deity's favored champion, and there is a fierce (yet friendly) rivalry between the Champion of the Stormlord and the Champion of the Platinum Dragon. The winner earns the title of "Supreme Champion" for an entire year.

The Day of Challenging is one of the most raucous holidays in Port Damali, and thousands of spectators attend the annual Godsbrawl held in the Temple of\xA0Kord to root for their favored deity's champion, particularly the chosen champions of the Storm Lord and the\xA0All-Hammer.\xA0
ast.target:
风暴之主的圣日是埃蒙最喧闹的节日之一。成千上万的观众参加一年一度的众神之战，在风暴之主神殿内的竞技场举行。人们为自己神祇青睐的冠军呐喊助威，风暴之主的冠军与白金之龙的冠军之间存在着激烈（但友好）的竞争。获胜者将获得“至高冠军”称号，为期一整年。

挑战之日是波尔达玛利最喧闹的节日之一，成千上万的观众参加在科德神殿举行的年度众神之战，为自己神祇的冠军呐喊助威，尤其是风暴之主和全锤之神的选定冠军。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spring begins early in the month of Dualahei, officially dateing on the 13th with the Renewal Festival.
ast.target: 春季在杜阿莱希月初开始，正式日期为13日的复兴节。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Though the Archeart is the god of spring, the peak of the spring season is the holy day of the Wildmother.

The people in the southern wilds of Tal'Dorei celebrate the Wildmother's strength by journeying to a place of great natural beauty. This could be the top of a mountainous waterfall, the center of a desert, or even an old and peaceful city park (such as Azalea Street Park in Emon). Though Emon rarely celebrates Wild's Grandeur, the few who do will plant trees in observance of the holiday.

The people of the Menagerie Coast set aside this day to sail for no reason other than the pleasure of observing the natural beauty of their surroundings. Those who still partake in elements of Ki'Nau culture take this day to appreciate the fruits and foods granted by the sea, leaving offerings of delicacies and small handmade crafts at temporary altars of twisted roots and grasses.
ast.target:
尽管万古者司掌春季，但春季的巅峰是野性之母的圣日。

塔尔'多雷南部荒野的人们通过前往自然美景之地来庆祝野性之母的力量。这可能是山间瀑布之巅、沙漠中心，甚至是古老而宁静的城市公园（如埃蒙的紫藤街公园）。尽管埃蒙很少庆祝野性之壮丽，但少数人会在此日植树以示纪念。

梅纳杰里海岸的人们则在这一天出海，只为享受观察周围自然美景的乐趣。那些仍保留基瑙文化元素的人会借此日感恩大海赐予的果实与食物，在由扭曲树根和草临时搭建的祭坛上留下美食和小型手工艺品作为祭品。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Moradin's holy day is Deep Solace, which is celebrated on the eighteenth day of the fifth month. Especially devout followers of the All-Hammer spend the day in isolation, meditating on the meaning of family and how they may be better mothers, fathers, siblings, and children.

The dwarven communities across Exandria, such as the ones in Grimgolir and Kraghammer, celebrate with a full day of feasting and drinking.\xA0
ast.target:
莫拉丁的圣日是深邃慰藉节，在第五个月的第十八天庆祝。全锤之神的虔诚追随者会独自度过这一天，冥想家庭的意义，思考如何成为更好的母亲、父亲、兄弟姐妹和子女。

遍布艾桑迪亚的矮人社区，如格里姆戈利尔和克拉格汉默，则以一整天的盛宴和饮酒来庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Summer begins in the middle of Unndilar, officially dateing at noon on the 26th day known as the Zenith.
ast.target: 夏季在温迪拉月中开始，正式日期为26日正午的至高点。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Corellon's holy day is called Elvendawn,
or Midsummer. It is celebrated on the twentieth day
of the sixth month, and commemorates the elves' first
emergence from the Feywild.

In Syngorn, the Elves open small doorways into the Feywild and celebrate alongside the wild fey with uncharacteristic vigor.

Though the Dwendalian
Empire doesn't promote the worship of the Arch Heart,
the elves of Bysaes Tyl quietly celebrate in private by
opening small doors to the Feywild and having a little
more wine than usual.\xA0
ast.target:
科瑞隆的圣日称为精灵黎明或仲夏节，在第六个月的第二十天庆祝，纪念精灵首次从妖精荒野中走出。

在辛戈恩，精灵们打开通往妖精荒野的小门，与狂野妖精一同以异乎寻常的热情庆祝。

尽管德温达利帝国不提倡崇拜万古之心，但拜萨伊斯·提尔的精灵们私下安静地庆祝，打开通往妖精荒野的小门，比平时多喝一点酒。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The holy day of the Dawnfather is the peak of the summer season.

Emon celebrates with an entire week of gift-giving and feasting, ending at midnight on the 21st of Sydenstar (the anniversary of the Battle of the Umbra Hills, where Zan Tal'Dorei dethroned Trist Drassig).

Whitestone (where the Dawnfather is the city's patron god) celebrates with gift-giving and a festival of lights around the Sun Tree. Due to the Briarwood occupation, money is thin, so most Whitestone folk choose to recount the small things they are thankful for, rather than buy gifts.

While other parts of Exandria feast, the Dwendalian
Empire uses this day as an opportunity to enlist more
soldiers in its army. The military holds great feasts and
hands out toy soldiers and other propaganda, encouraging people to enlist and help fight against the evil that
threatens the king.\xA0
ast.target:
黎明之父的圣日是夏季的巅峰。

埃蒙以整整一周的赠礼和盛宴庆祝，于西登斯塔月21日午夜结束（即安布拉山战役纪念日，赞·塔尔'多雷推翻特里斯特·德拉西格之日）。

怀特斯通（黎明之父是该城的守护神）以赠礼和围绕太阳树的灯光节庆祝。由于布里尔伍德占领，资金紧张，大多数怀特斯通居民选择讲述他们感激的小事，而非购买礼物。

当艾桑迪亚其他地区盛宴庆祝时，德温达利帝国则利用这一天招募更多士兵入伍。军方举办盛大宴会，分发玩具士兵和其他宣传品，鼓励人们参军，帮助对抗威胁国王的邪恶。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Autumn begins on the 3rd of Fessuran and is typically celebrated with feasting in rural regions and with carnivals in the cities.
ast.target: 秋季始于费苏兰月3日，农村地区通常以盛宴庆祝，城市则以嘉年华庆祝。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Law Bearer's holy day is Civilization's
Dawn, which is celebrated on the autumnal equinox,
usually the twenty-second day of the ninth month.

Emon celebrates with a great bonfire in the square of each neighborhood, around which each community dances and gives gifts.

In the
Dwendalian Empire, people celebrate by having feasts 
in honor of the laws of the Dwendal bloodline. One seat
at every table is left open for the king, who eats in spirit
with the people he rules.\xA0
ast.target:
律法之持的圣日是文明之黎明，在秋分庆祝，通常在第九个月的第二十二天。

埃蒙在每个社区的广场上点燃巨大的篝火，社区成员围绕篝火跳舞并互赠礼物。

在德温达利帝国，人们通过举办盛宴来纪念德温达尔血统的法律。每张桌子都留有一个空位给国王，国王在精神上与他的子民共餐。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Raven Queen's holy day is called the Night of Ascension, celebrating her apotheosis. The actual date of the her rise to divinity is unclear, but the Night of Ascension is celebrated on the thirteenth day of the tenth month.

Though most in Emon see this celebration of the dead as unnerving and macabre, the followers of the Matron of Ravens believe that the honored dead would prefer to be venerated with cheer, not misery.

What was once a night of cheery celebration of the dead in the Dwendalian Empire has recently become an occasion to burn effigies and decry the Kryn Dynasty for their unnatural relationship with death.
ast.target:
鸦后之母的圣日称为升天之夜，庆祝她的神化。她升入神界的实际日期不详，但升天之夜在第十个月的第十三天庆祝。

尽管埃蒙大多数人认为这种对死者的庆祝令人不安且诡异，但渡鸦之主的追随者认为，受尊敬的死者更愿被以欢乐而非悲伤的方式纪念。

在德温达利帝国，原本欢乐的死者之夜近来已成为焚烧肖像和谴责克瑞恩王朝与死亡非自然关系的场合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Winter begins on the 2nd day of Duscar, the Barren Eve, which is a nighttime celebration and remembrance of those who fell in battle.
ast.target: 冬季始于杜斯卡月2日的荒芜前夕，这是一个夜间庆祝和纪念阵亡者的时刻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bahamut's holy day is called Embertide, and is celebrated on the fifth day of Duscar. This is a day of remembrance, solemnity, and respect for those who have fallen in the defense of others.
ast.target: 巴哈姆特的圣日称为余烬潮，在杜斯卡月第五天庆祝。这是一个纪念、肃穆和尊重那些为保护他人而牺牲者的日子。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This day celebrates the freedom of Tal'Dorei from Errevon the Rimelord. It is the peak of the winter season, so devout followers of the Matron of Ravens (as the goddess of winter) consider it to be one of her holy days.

However, in most of the land, people see Winter's Crest as a secular holiday, often celebrated with omnipresent music in public areas, lavish gift-giving to relatives and loved ones, and the cutting and decorating of trees placed indoors. The Sun Tree in Whitestone is often decorated with lights and other baubles for Winter's Crest.
ast.target:
这一天庆祝塔尔'多雷从冰霜领主埃雷文手中获得自由。这是冬季的巅峰，因此鸦后之母（作为冬季女神）的虔诚追随者将其视为她的圣日之一。

然而，在大部分地区，人们将冬冠节视为世俗节日，通常以公共场所无处不在的音乐、向亲友慷慨赠礼以及砍伐和装饰室内树木来庆祝。怀特斯通的太阳树常被装饰上灯光和其他小饰品以庆祝冬冠节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calendar of Faerûn of the Forgotten Realms.
ast.target: 被遗忘国度中费伦的日历。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shieldmeet was the equivalent of a leap year day in the Calendar of Harptos, occurring once every four years, adding a day after the festival of Midsummer and before Eleasis 1. Traditionally the day was used for fairs, bazaars, musical and theatrical performances, and tournaments of skill and magical ability. Nobles usually held court to hear the petitions of their people and to make or renew trade pacts, alliances, and agreements. Shieldmeet was known as Cinnaelos'Cor (also seen as Cinnaeloscor), "the Day of Corellon's Peace" in elvish and marked the end of an aeloulaev and the beginning of a new one in the elven Aryselmalyn calendar.
ast.target: 盾牌节相当于哈普托斯历中的闰日，每四年一次，在仲夏节之后、埃莱西斯月1日之前增加一天。传统上，这一天用于集市、展览、音乐和戏剧表演以及技能和魔法能力的比赛。贵族通常开庭听取民众的请愿，并缔结或续签贸易协定、联盟和协议。盾牌节在精灵语中称为Cinnaelos'Cor（也写作Cinnaeloscor），意为“科瑞隆和平之日”，标志着精灵阿里塞尔马林历中一个aeloulaev的结束和新一个的开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The Feast of the Moon, or Moonfest, was an annual festival in the Calendar of Harptos, occurring between the final night of Uktar and the first day of Nightal. It was the last great festival of the calendar year.

The day traditionally marked the onset of winter. It was also a time to celebrate and honor the ancestors and the respected dead. On this day, folk blessed their ancestors' graves and performed the Ritual of Remembrance. People also gathered to tell stories of the deeds of their ancestors and of the gods until deep into the night, until they merged and became legend. This was a time to hear of past heroes, great treasures, and lost cities.

In Faer\xC3\u0192\xC2\xBBn, battles were typically fought between harvest-time and the coming of winter. This meant that most of the fighting usually occurred in the month of Uktar. The timing of the Feast of the Moon\xC3\xA2\xE2\u201A\xAC\xE2\u20ACafter recently slain soldiers had joined the ranks of the dead\xC3\xA2\xE2\u201A\xAC\xE2\u20ACwas thus practical, if sadly ironic.

The Heralds of Faer\xC3\u0192\xC2\xBBn had a number of special duties on the Feast of the Moon. Prime among these was to perform the Bloodsong ceremony, at which a Herald publicly recited the genealogies of each noble family in the area. In this way, the Heralds reaffirmed a noble family's traditional authority and status, as well as the respect accorded to them.

Priests of a number of deities of various pantheons held rites, ceremonies, and festivals on the Feast of the Moon. Many, though not all, focused on remembering the dead in one way or another.
ast.target:
月之盛宴，或称月节，是哈普托斯历中的年度节日，位于乌克塔月最后一夜与奈塔尔月第一天之间。这是日历年的最后一个重大节日。

这一天传统上标志着冬季的开始。同时也是庆祝和纪念祖先及受尊敬逝者的时刻。在这一天，人们祝福祖先的坟墓，并举行纪念仪式。人们还聚集在一起讲述祖先和神祇的事迹，直至深夜，这些故事逐渐融合成为传说。这是聆听过去英雄、伟大宝藏和失落城市故事的时刻。

在费伦，战斗通常在收获季节和冬季来临之间进行。这意味着大多数战斗通常发生在乌克塔月。月之盛宴的时间——在最近阵亡的士兵加入死者行列之后——因此既实用又具有讽刺意味。

费伦的传令官在月之盛宴上承担多项特殊职责。其中最重要的是执行血歌仪式，传令官公开背诵该地区每个贵族家族的家谱。通过这种方式，传令官重申贵族家族的传统权威和地位，以及对其的尊重。

多个神系的神祇祭司在月之盛宴上举行仪式、典礼和节日。许多（尽管并非全部）都以某种方式侧重于纪念死者。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Highharvestide was an annual festival in the Calendar of Harptos, taking place between 30 Eleint and 1 Marpenoth. It was traditionally a feast to celebrate the harvest and the abundance of food, but also the time when those wishing to travel left on their journeys before winter set in.

Preparations for the feast dateed as early as a tenday before, while preparing, cooking, and preserving the harvest for the cold winter months. Traditions varied from community to community, but examples of festive activity included food-related contests; races and challenges of skill and strength; receiving homemade sweets from the local clergy; and priests blessing larders, wine cellars, grain bins, and food preserves.

This day was often an important anniversary to various governments. Often, taxes and tithes came due, rulers held "open courts" to hear the concerns of their citizens, oaths were publicly renewed, troops received marching orders to new duty stations, and guilds met to confer on prices and rate changes for goods and services.

According to tradition, dwarves only drank water and elves drank only dew on this day. However, these traditions began to fade in the 14th and 15th century DR.

It was said that children born on this day were favored by Tymora to have lifelong good luck but be smitten with wanderlust. Another legend was that human females born on this day had control over their reproductive system (i.e., got pregnant only when they wanted to) by force of will alone, and that they could instantly sense when they had been poisoned, either by ingestion or being bitten by a venomous creature for example.
ast.target:
丰收节是哈普托斯历中的年度节日，位于埃莱因特月30日与马佩诺斯月1日之间。传统上，这是一个庆祝丰收和食物丰盛的盛宴，同时也是那些希望旅行的人在冬季来临前出发的时刻。

节日的准备工作最早可提前十天开始，包括准备、烹饪和储存收获物以备寒冬。不同社区的传统各异，但节日活动的例子包括与食物相关的比赛；赛跑和技能与力量挑战；从当地神职人员处接收自制甜点；以及祭司为食品储藏室、酒窖、粮仓和食物储存设施祈福。

这一天通常是各国政府的重要纪念日。通常，税收和什一税到期，统治者举行“公开法庭”听取公民的关切，公开重申誓言，部队接到前往新执勤地点的行军命令，行会开会商讨商品和服务的价格及费率变动。

根据传统，矮人在这一天只喝水，精灵只喝露水。然而，这些传统在DR 14世纪和15世纪开始逐渐消失。

据说在这一天出生的孩子受到泰摩拉的眷顾，一生好运，但会染上旅行癖。另一个传说是，在这一天出生的女性人类仅凭意志力就能控制自己的生殖系统（即只在想要时怀孕），并且能立即感知到自己是否中毒，例如通过摄入或被有毒生物咬伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Greengrass was a festival to welcome in the first day of spring in the Calendar of Harptos. It occured annually on a special day between Tarsakh 30 and Mirtul 1. Traditionally, the wealthier people brought out flowers to give to the less wealthy, who either wore them or spread them on the ground to encourage the deities to usher in the summer.
ast.target: 绿草节是哈普托斯历中迎接春季第一天的节日。每年在塔萨克月30日与米图尔月1日之间的特殊日子举行。传统上，富裕的人会拿出鲜花送给较不富裕的人，后者要么佩戴鲜花，要么将鲜花撒在地上，以鼓励神祇迎来夏季。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Midwinter (also known as Deadwinter Day) was a festival to mark the midpoint of winter in the Calendar of Harptos. It occured on a special day between Hammer 30 and Alturiak 1. Amongst nobles and monarchs it was known as Midwinter and was traditionally used to make or renew alliances, although the common people called it Deadwinter Day, a reference to the cold and hard times that remained before the spring.

On Midwinter Day the Red Fellowship of the Deity known as the Red Knight observes the Retreat. This solemn ceremony consists of an assembly wherein the clergy discuss the previous year's campaigns. Strategies are discussed, battles analyzed, and the accumulated lore integrated into the church's teachings.

The holiest day of the year for the Church of Shevarash is Midwinter Night, during which the Dark Court Slaughter is remembered. Inductions into the ranks of the clergy occur at this time. Each new cleric screams vows of vengeance into the night air and swears neither to laugh nor smile until the Spider Queen and her followers are no more.
ast.target:
仲冬节（也称为死冬之日）是哈普托斯历中标记冬季中点的节日。在哈默月30日与阿尔图里亚克月1日之间的特殊日子举行。在贵族和君主中，它被称为仲冬节，传统上用于缔结或续签联盟，尽管平民称之为死冬之日，指的是春季到来之前仍然存在的寒冷和艰难时期。

在仲冬节，被称为红骑士的神祇的红衣团体会举行撤退仪式。这一庄严仪式包括集会，神职人员讨论过去一年的战役。分析战略，分析战斗，并将积累的知识整合到教会的教义中。

谢瓦拉什教会一年中最神圣的日子是仲冬之夜，在此期间纪念黑暗宫廷屠杀。此时举行新神职人员的入会仪式。每位新牧师向夜空尖叫复仇誓言，并发誓在蜘蛛女王及其追随者不复存在之前，既不笑也不微笑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Midsummer was a festival that celebrated love and music through feast. It occurred between Flamerule 30 and Eleasis 1 on the Calendar of Harptos. It was a time when love advanced, and it was said the deities themselves took a hand to ensure good weather. If bad weather was experienced on this night it was considered an extremely bad omen. Shieldmeet occurred the day after Midsummer on leap years.
ast.target: 仲夏节是一个通过盛宴庆祝爱情和音乐的节日。在哈普托斯历中，位于弗莱姆鲁尔月30日与埃莱西斯月1日之间。这是一个爱情进展的时刻，据说神祇们亲自出手确保好天气。如果这一夜遇到坏天气，则被视为极其不祥的预兆。盾牌节在闰年发生在仲夏节之后的一天。
